name: GAME CHANGING ADS IN GEORGIA (via VPP)
subject: this is how we win in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we need to our ads to reach across Georgia
| **GOOD NEWS:** Our robust ad campaign is reaching youth voters all across Georgia right as they’re starting to cast their ballots, _and they’re ready to TAKE DOWN MAGA puppet Herschel Walker!_

**BAD NEWS:** **Ad space is scarce and expensive – without your $7 donation, we are just DAYS AWAY from our ad fund completely drying up!!** [There are 9 days left before the runoff Election Day. Republican dark money groups are throwing millions behind Walker’s ads – we need your help to compete!! Rush $7 right now to show voters Walker is WRONG for Georgia »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/36229?t=6&akid=5603%2E878179%2EyWej_-) **AD FUND GOAL $30,000** | [Chip in $7 to fund our ads to re-elect Raphael Warnock! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/36229?t=7&akid=5603%2E878179%2EyWej_-)
---
* * *
Look, Herschel Walker is a grossly incompetent MAGA puppet. Senator Warnock has done so much to protect voting rights, reproductive rights, and more for Georgia and the country.

**Warnock is the CLEAR choice, but with Republicans riling up their base to vote in record numbers, we need to mobilize _even more people to the polls._**

**This means effective, far reaching ads to meet voters where they’re at: ONLINE!**

[Remember: after losing this majority AGAIN Republicans are desperate to have a 50-50 Senate so they can BLOCK all our progress. We don’t have much time left, so rush $7 to our Warnock ad fund today »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/36229?t=8&akid=5603%2E878179%2EyWej_-)

name: Warnock HQ
subject: we have urgent news we need to share.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |

Friend, with the runoff election rapidly approaching in just 9 days, we have urgent news we need to share.
**Here's the good news:** Rev. Raphael Warnock surged ahead of Trump-backed Herschel Walker to narrowly lead him in the general election, all thanks to supporters like _you._
**But here's the bad news:** Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment are spending MILLIONS to smear Rev. Warnock with attack ads, help Walker pull ahead, and turn Georgia red.
**That's why we cannot concede a drop of momentum to Republicans in these pivotal final days before this runoff ends. But right now, we're falling $27,384 short of the funds we need to raise by midnight – and every dollar is critical to reaching as many voters as we can as they begin casting their ballots.**
**[Rev. Warnock is counting on your immediate grassroots support, friend, so please: Will you rush $5 or more right now to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55178732/380866989/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5085-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDdjMjlhOS1hZjZlLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G_5FpmJwiI0GJQ3FqRaDG8ewWDruH2yfQXhRedIkW4A=)**

Thank you for stepping up in this critical moment.

– Team Warnock
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I'm grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we're in a runoff election against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That's why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

clean_body: If this team digs deep and shows up the way you did to flip Georgia blue last cycle, we can win this runoff. | | Election Day may be behind us, but our work is far from finished, Derek. The Senate race in Georgia is headed to a runoff -- and that means the result of this election depends on what we do in the next nine days. You haven’t donated this year to the DNC. Before Wednesday's deadline, split a $10 donation between Raphael Warnock’s campaign and the DNC to help win this runoff, defeat Herschel Walker, and support Democrats nationwide. Derek, it all comes down to the Peach State. Raphael Warnock is running against Herschel Walker -- a MAGA Republican who supports a nationwide abortion ban, opposes Medicaid expansion, and has aligned himself with Rick Scott -- the architect of the GOP efforts to slash Social Security and Medicare. You better believe Republicans are going to do everything they can to take back power and block Democrats from continuing to make any progress for workers and families across the country. That includes pouring millions of dollars into this runoff to defeat Sen. Warnock. But their efforts are no match for the power of grassroots supporters like you, so please: We’re racing against the clock to reach every voter, run statewide ads, and fuel important on-the-ground efforts so we can re-elect Raphael Warnock and keep this seat blue. But if this team digs deep and shows up the way you did to flip Georgia blue last cycle, we can win in Georgia and across the country. Thanks for everything, The Democrats When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. body:
I hate to bother you again, but I need ONE last push of help from my strongest supporters.

I am hoping for just 4 more gifts from PA before midnight to hit my End of Week goal!

If we can blow our End of Week goal out of the water, we'll have the resources we need to support our INCREDIBLE Democrats and continue the work we started.

critical moment.

That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023 yet. Does this look right? | 2023 DLCC MEMBERSHIP SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: 2023 Member Status: PENDING Suggested Gift: $7 TRIPLE-MATCH: ACTIVE This year showed the nation just how critical Democratic leadership at the state level can be – abortion access, voting rights, gun safety, and so much more are being decided in state legislatures across the country. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. Becoming an official member of this grassroots movement to elect state Democrats is the best step you can take to help build a better future in the states – and with our limited-time triple-match, your donation will have three times the impact to fuel this movement through the end of the month. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Over 600 Democrats have already stepped up and fueled this fight as official members, will you join them today? name: LOSING GA (via VPP)
subject: We're worried…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Hurry! Sen. Warnock is in trouble >>
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=5495%2E878179%2EcwVEZw)._
---
Senator Warnock has a slim lead in the polls because of supporters like you, _but this doesn’t bode well_ ... [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35836?t=7&akid=5495%2E878179%2EcwVEZw) | [**DON’T WAIT FOR WALKER TO CATCH UP! CHIP IN $5 NOW TO PROTECT DEMOCRATS LIKE SEN. WARNOCK »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35836?t=8&akid=5495%2E878179%2EcwVEZw)
---
**_HERE’S THE BAD NEWS:_** Dark money is _pouring in_ to help far-right Republicans like Herschel Walker – _this is just the start._

**_BUT HERE’S THE WORST NEWS:_** If they succeed at buying this seat, **we’ll face total gridlock in the Senate from MAGA Republicans** ... _and all of our Democratic priorities, from voting rights to reproductive rights to so much more will be blocked!_

So we’re _sprinting_ to raise $15,000 before midnight to save Democrats like Warnock —**the entire state of our Democracy depends on it!**
[**_We can stop their scheme to steal this seat, but we need your support. Please, chip in $5 today to protect Democrats like Senator Warnock and expand our Senate majority! »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35837?t=9&akid=5495%2E878179%2EcwVEZw)
**GOAL: $15,000 || DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/35838?t=10&akid=5495%2E878179%2EcwVEZw)

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=5495%2E878179%2EcwVEZw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=5495%2E878179%2EcwVEZw).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=5495%2E878179%2EcwVEZw) to request fewer emails. name: Herschel
subject: We missed our goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
With the incredibly short timeframe of a runoff, every single hour is critically important. |
---
I have some bad news, Peter.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Our new lawn signs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter - we just placed a huge order for runoff yard signs, but we need your **IMMEDIATE** help to pay for them.

Please let me explain:

It was crystal clear to everyone in the country that Election Day was November 8th. Both Democrats and Republicans spent billions of dollars in races across America to emblazon the date of the election into the minds of voters.

In Georgia, candidates for governor, other statewide offices, and Congress spent large sums to turn out voters, in addition to the advertising from our Senate race.

_**But now we have a new runoff election set for Tuesday, December 6th.**_ Peter, we only have 9 days to ensure Georgia voters know to get out and VOTE in this special election.

Unlike the ballot given to voters on November 8th, there is only one race in Georgia on the December 6th ballot - _**our Senate race.**_

That's why we decided to order a new round of yard signs - informing voters of the new runoff Election date.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974158:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r)
[** FUND A YARD SIGN TO A GEORGIA VOTER ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974158:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r)
We're not going to outraise Raphael Warnock, but we can still win this race. **To do that though,[I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974158:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r)**

These signs will serve as a reminder to Georgians passing by that the United States Senate race is not over.

When we placed our initial order for yard signs last week, we had no idea just how quickly we'd run out of them. Each order costs the campaign $30,000 - a large sum of money that we just don't have to pay for this new batch. **[I'm coming to you today with a simple request: _will you fund a yard sign for a Georgia voter?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974158:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r)**

**[With a $25 dollar donation today, you can help ensure that we 're able to pay for our next batch of yard signs so voters across Georgia are reminded to out and vote on Tuesday, December 6th.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974158:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r)**

**[Will you do your part RIGHT NOW?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974158:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974158:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r)
Herschel Walker

[** DONATE TODAY ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974158:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974159:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974160:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974161:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974162:6SJ4DbGNZ:m:1:3331421248:27DD838F03870DDD82052DED3C8C645A:r)

name: House Conservatives
subject: Tell us what you REALLY think: 👉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Peter,
A new Rasmussen poll shows the majority of Americas -- _**a whopping 65%**_ \-- believe America is headed down the **WRONG TRACK!**
Republican leaders like our NEW Majority Leader, Steve Scalise, are working to SAVE AMERICA, but we need your feedback ASAP to this one question poll:
[**Do you believe America, under the Biden Administration, is headed in the RIGHT direction or down the WRONG track?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974156:JlV5DbGyN:m:1:3317145305:D81FBF56DC21476355BBC8AE76FA3DC3:r)
**[RIGHT DIRECTION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974156:JlV5DbGyN:m:1:3317145305:D81FBF56DC21476355BBC8AE76FA3DC3:r)**
**[WRONG TRACK](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974156:JlV5DbGyN:m:1:3317145305:D81FBF56DC21476355BBC8AE76FA3DC3:r)**
_We 're finalizing results at 9 AM, so please submit your response before then.** _
Without your honest feedback, there's no way GOP leaders can know what our top Patriots and the rest of America thinks. We're finalizing our top priorities, planning to address the most pressing issues facing our country, and honing in on our legislative agenda before the new Congress begins.
The Biden Administration and Radical Democrats have left our new Republican Majority **A LOT** of work to do in order to save America. That's why we need your feedback to understand where to begin.
Can you please take just a moment to answer this one question poll:
[**Do you believe America, under the Biden Administration, is headed in the RIGHT direction or down the WRONG track?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974156:JlV5DbGyN:m:1:3317145305:D81FBF56DC21476355BBC8AE76FA3DC3:r)
Thank you,
House Conservatives

Thanks again,
Steve

body:
|

| | |
**Your support has never gone unnoticed, Peter. **

We've asked a lot of you over the last two years. We leaned on you numerous times to keep us going, and we want to thank you for all you've done this cycle to support House Republicans.

**But thank you is not enough.**

We want to give you something you can wear with pride to ensure all your friends, family, and neighbors know what you helped us accomplish.

name: Herschel
subject: I know I’ve asked a lot lately
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

**This is it.**

_**This is when we dig deep.**_

We're in overtime. The crowd is cheering, and the lights are bright.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974203:6iDbibGwN:m:1:3317145305:470A6A9CD040D4BA9F3C80B2053CA480:r)
I have asked for a lot of you over the last few months, **[but can you dig a little deeper right now and invest $25 or more in our Senate campaign to help us win in overtime?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974203:6iDbibGwN:m:1:3317145305:470A6A9CD040D4BA9F3C80B2053CA480:r)**

_**I can't remember ever losing an overtime game in my football career, and I certainly don't intend to start now.**_ I'm asking for your support today so that I can be the 50th Senate vote against the disastrous Biden-Schumer-Warnock agenda.

Georgia deserves better. America deserves better.

It's time to pull out this win in overtime.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974203:6iDbibGwN:m:1:3317145305:470A6A9CD040D4BA9F3C80B2053CA480:r)
Herschel

subject: Need your help to get this out
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We launched our first ad of the runoff, but we’re not up on as many stations as we’d like to be. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0183%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=vTMLEmELbGl%2bP1IjrpcA0Q&sysid=1)

---
Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41919%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lkvw%2fK6MjGGqhlgbGUsPSQ&sysid=1)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41910%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lqawZAaXbDMIP%2flCk5GOvg&sysid=1)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41911%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1d%2b%2f7MIz8rSaVFkst9WoNg&sysid=1)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41912%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oEehh5D086s6Xn5DKpF5zg&sysid=1)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41913%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LmAqOOzeXhdUhJ9Q7M4NPQ&sysid=1)**

[** Donate Today → **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41914%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q7FstYXVP8VoWMxeAB7FBw&sysid=1)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmgu3fb5d0l1ga2ohvu0p2le1d9l0ls7dvkht6o8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdj6coj0cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5nvmblsnuknv6s8f4ge486gembfi03paenus8vo_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdj6coj0cdh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc0j0abp2f02tfs51mutpodih0k4s24ejbtpqde8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdj6coj0cdh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zkubui6g6jd6p7a618a2uj2t6j34o1t1hi0m0p5g).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcqavbv0l4cvoip88nd63oovrsi06kbf08q4bjt8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdj6coj0c5h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrtmgod11ik5ngtus0c48huunkcdukn74faaqdp8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdj6coj0c5h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974713:JqasWbGNg:m:1:3253819041:0403063A5821B8AEE24F66763E977935:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974713:JqasWbGNg:m:1:3253819041:0403063A5821B8AEE24F66763E977935:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974713:JqasWbGNg:m:1:3253819041:0403063A5821B8AEE24F66763E977935:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974713:JqasWbGNg:m:1:3253819041:0403063A5821B8AEE24F66763E977935:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974713:JqasWbGNg:m:1:3253819041:0403063A5821B8AEE24F66763E977935:r)

Herschel Walker

subject: Peter, look at the damage Biden's decision caused
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974702:6YRJWbGgN:m:1:3345639852:F5F6B34861E4B4C4290D557CDD761EE6:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974702:6YRJWbGgN:m:1:3345639852:F5F6B34861E4B4C4290D557CDD761EE6:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974702:6YRJWbGgN:m:1:3345639852:F5F6B34861E4B4C4290D557CDD761EE6:r)

Thank you,

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: READ THIS: the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12-year-old little girl -- is now your son.
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975573:JsYkcbGNV:m:1:3317145305:31458ADF5830D9474E9EE898FA9E9841:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975573:JsYkcbGNV:m:1:3317145305:31458ADF5830D9474E9EE898FA9E9841:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975573:JsYkcbGNV:m:1:3317145305:31458ADF5830D9474E9EE898FA9E9841:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975573:JsYkcbGNV:m:1:3317145305:31458ADF5830D9474E9EE898FA9E9841:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975573:JsYkcbGNV:m:1:3317145305:31458ADF5830D9474E9EE898FA9E9841:r) **
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: My race for Senate just went into OVERTIME.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | | **RUNOFF ELECTION ALERT!!**
**Runoff announced for Dec. 6**
---

Peter - my goal was to beat Senator Raphael Warnock outright on Election Day.

But neither of us got more than 50% of the vote, so now we're headed to a runoff election in Georgia.

**_In other words, my race for Senate just went into OVERTIME._**

[SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975741:JTEIcbGN6:m:1:3331421248:D7CDEF85F3EAD8F00997F00CA0BF256A:r)
---

I can tell you from my football days that overtime is the ultimate test of a team's grit and determination. Overtime is grueling when you've been playing hard for four quarters. But we need to leave it all on the field if we're going to pull off this win.

[STAY ON THE FIELD FOR OVERTIME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975741:JTEIcbGN6:m:1:3331421248:D7CDEF85F3EAD8F00997F00CA0BF256A:r)
---

**If Republicans lose to Raphael Warnock for the second time in a row, Georgia will have two Democrat senators for at least the next four years.**
_ _
We have a clear path to stop this liberal takeover of the Peach State._We must knock on every door, call every voter, and leave no stone unturned. But that only happens if every conservative pitches in._

[SAVE GEORGIA NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975741:JTEIcbGN6:m:1:3331421248:D7CDEF85F3EAD8F00997F00CA0BF256A:r)
---

Raphael Warnock and Chuck Schumer have virtually unlimited resources to blanket Georgia with ads, but our resources are depleted after a long and expensive campaign. We need immediate support to flip this seat **RED** and execute our plan.

**_[Please, will you rush $35 or more right now to win the final race of 2022?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975741:JTEIcbGN6:m:1:3331421248:D7CDEF85F3EAD8F00997F00CA0BF256A:r "Please, Peter, will you rush
$35 or more right now to win the final race of 2022?")_**

Onward to victory,

Herschel Walker

name: Draft DeSantis
subject: Look at the damage Biden caused, Peter.
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974773:JQZWcbGdN:m:1:3346849603:72951E96A6A9B8F00179B9C1CE435F9D:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974773:JQZWcbGdN:m:1:3346849603:72951E96A6A9B8F00179B9C1CE435F9D:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974773:JQZWcbGdN:m:1:3346849603:72951E96A6A9B8F00179B9C1CE435F9D:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Election update: Rudy Salas is currently slightly trailing his GOP opponent in the CA-22 District, The Washington Post election model predicts when all the votes are counted that Salas will win! So let's secure this race for Rudy Salas by making sure EVERY VOTE IS COUNTED!!
body:
They’re still counting this one
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T09b7710e-9e83-4113-aaa9-58732b5fef9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | **_UPDATE :_**** ****Republicans currently have 220 House seats, but there are a few seats left, and we're in good shape in them. _In CA-22, the news is good._****_ _**_Though Rudy Salas is currently slightly trailing his GOP opponent, The Washington Post election model predicts when all the votes are counted that Salas will win! So let's secure this race for Rudy Salas by making sure EVERY VOTE IS COUNTED!!_ **[To do this, can you give $5, $10, $25 to Rudy Salas so he can pay staffers and lawyers--the watchdogs--for this effort? Let's take another seat, keep the GOP majority so small they remain in chaos!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32acb16a-fff0-47af-85f3-30aa00f9d7cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_THANK YOU!_**
**_Cliff_** On Sun, Nov 20, 2022 at 10:28 PM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@mail.blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, **WE HAVE A FEW RACES LEFT THAT WE MUST DELIVER** **[Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Rudy Salas!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f47781e-b1f8-41e2-9e5f-5f772cc7ae2c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_Republicans are now expected to have a 5-7 vote edge in the House. Two of those votes, lunatics Andy Biggs & Matt Gaetz, have promised to will NEVER vote for Kevin McCarthy as leader. 31 voted for Biggs over McCartthy in a leadership contest. And Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, who is one of the more normal Republicans, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats if McCarthy doesn't have the votes._** **__This all adds up to something simple: Every seat we win makes it more likely McCarthy won't be Speaker, the GOP won't be able to agree on any candidate and Democrats can join Bacon and perhaps a half dozen to a dozen sane Republicans to form a power sharing agreement, where progressive legislation we care about can get a vote.__** **_One of the races still outstanding is California's 22nd Congressional District, a seat long held by Democrats, but taken over in 2020 by Republican David Valadao. Democrat Rudy Salas is currently within 4,000 votes with an entire 25% of the vote left to count. A political science professor in the area was quoted saying she expects the race to be decided by 100, maybe 1000 votes at most._**
---
|
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. In CA-22, the news is good. Though Rudy Salas is currently slightly trailing his GOP opponent, The Washington Post election model predicts when all the votes are counted that Salas will win! So let's secure this race for Rudy Salas by making sure EVERY VOTE IS COUNTED!! THANK YOU! Cliff On Sun, Nov 20, 2022 at 10:28 PM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@mail.blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, WE HAVE A FEW RACES LEFT THAT WE MUST DELIVER Republicans are now expected to have a 5-7 vote edge in the House. Two of those votes, lunatics Andy Biggs & Matt Gaetz, have promised to will NEVER vote for Kevin McCarthy as leader. 31 voted for Biggs over McCartthy in a leadership contest. And Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, who is one of the more normal Republicans, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats if McCarthy doesn't have the votes. This all adds up to something simple: Every seat we win makes it more likely McCarthy won't be Speaker, the GOP won't be able to agree on any candidate and Democrats can join Bacon and perhaps a half dozen to a dozen sane Republicans to form a power sharing agreement, where progressive legislation we care about can get a vote. One of the races still outstanding is California's 22nd Congressional District, a seat long held by Democrats, but taken over in 2020 by Republican David Valadao. Democrat Rudy Salas is currently within 4,000 votes with an entire 25% of the vote left to count. A political science professor in the area was quoted saying she expects the race to be decided by 100, maybe 1000 votes at most. | | | | | | | | | We must ensure Salas has the funds for staff & lawyers for what might be another week or two, so every vote is counted, we can take this seat and make it less likely there is a Speaker McCarthy, and more likely a power sharing arrangement that ensures the issues we care about don't get buried. Thank you to all the members of the Blue Amp Action Community who keep showing they intend to take every seat we can. We proved that we would not back down and showed up responsibly to exercise our civic and constitutional rights by voting. Now we must press forward in our advocacy for fair maps and elections because one thing is clear: fair democracy is worth fighting for. Hitting November’s goal will keep our work for not only the next few weeks on track but also the next few months.

We anticipate pivotal moments ahead in 2023, with pending redraws in target states and impending cases before the United States Supreme Court. The decisions of these cases may determine the direction of voter rights for future generations and may have a bearing on federal elections.

But, having seen what we can do together, we will not abandon democracy.

**[Please contribute today and give our team the resources they need to continue democracy-saving work. Our future depends on it.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55182645/380903684/-1585539253?refcode=20221128_AOTL_F_eom2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhZGJlM2EwLTFjNmYtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1ODU4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=T-by_czp1WLld66GueVudE7R9xwAkdZHTXf2H1vwvls=)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need you to stay on the field 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | | **RUNOFF ELECTION ALERT!!**
**Runoff announced for Dec. 6**
---

Peter - my goal was to beat Senator Raphael Warnock outright on Election Day.

But neither of us got more than 50% of the vote, so now we're headed to a runoff election in Georgia.

**_In other words, my race for Senate just went into OVERTIME._**

[SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975827:J0AFcbG1N:m:1:3253819041:E52B7F8AD1059B6A971D0700C35F66CF:r)
---

I can tell you from my football days that overtime is the ultimate test of a team's grit and determination. Overtime is grueling when you've been playing hard for four quarters. But we need to leave it all on the field if we're going to pull off this win.

[STAY ON THE FIELD FOR OVERTIME](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975827:J0AFcbG1N:m:1:3253819041:E52B7F8AD1059B6A971D0700C35F66CF:r)
---

**If Republicans lose to Raphael Warnock for the second time in a row, Georgia will have two Democrat senators for at least the next four years.**
**_ _
We have a clear path to stop this liberal takeover of the Peach State._We must knock on every door, call every voter, and leave no stone unturned. But that only happens if every conservative pitches in._

[SAVE GEORGIA NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975827:J0AFcbG1N:m:1:3253819041:E52B7F8AD1059B6A971D0700C35F66CF:r)
---

Raphael Warnock and Chuck Schumer have virtually unlimited resources to blanket Georgia with ads, but our resources are depleted after a long and expensive campaign. We need immediate support to flip this seat **RED and execute our plan.**
**
**_[Please, will you rush $35 or more right now to win the final race of 2022?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975827:J0AFcbG1N:m:1:3253819041:E52B7F8AD1059B6A971D0700C35F66CF:r "Please, Peter, will you rush
$35 or more right now to win the final race of 2022?")_**

Onward to victory,

Herschel Walker****

|
---

This Georgia runoff election is going to be an all-out _DAWG FIGHT_ , and **[Herschel Walker needs us every step of the way.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975942:6dRk3bGNs:m:1:3374627611:2B1951B90AE51E5D41A5102A4FEB30BB:r)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I need you to stay on the field, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | | **RUNOFF ELECTION ALERT!!**
**Runoff announced for Dec. 6**
---

Peter - my goal was to beat Senator Raphael Warnock outright on Election Day.

But neither of us got more than 50% of the vote, so now we're headed to a runoff election in Georgia.

**_In other words, my race for Senate just went into OVERTIME._**

[SUPPORT HERSCHEL WALKER](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975584:JdXP3bGFN:m:1:3317145305:FEFF1ED36CAC312A14AD74CC6C022532:r)
---

I can tell you from my football days that overtime is the ultimate test of a team's grit and determination. Overtime is grueling when you've been playing hard for four quarters. But we need to leave it all on the field if we're going to pull off this win.

[STAY ON THE FIELD FOR OVERTIME](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975584:JdXP3bGFN:m:1:3317145305:FEFF1ED36CAC312A14AD74CC6C022532:r)
---

**If Republicans lose to Raphael Warnock for the second time in a row, Georgia will have two Democrat senators for at least the next four years.**
_ _
We have a clear path to stop this liberal takeover of the Peach State._We must knock on every door, call every voter, and leave no stone unturned. But that only happens if every conservative pitches in._

[SAVE GEORGIA NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975584:JdXP3bGFN:m:1:3317145305:FEFF1ED36CAC312A14AD74CC6C022532:r)
---

Raphael Warnock and Chuck Schumer have virtually unlimited resources to blanket Georgia with ads, but our resources are depleted after a long and expensive campaign. We need immediate support to flip this seat **RED** and execute our plan.

**_[Please, will you rush $35 or more right now to win the final race of 2022?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61975584:JdXP3bGFN:m:1:3317145305:FEFF1ED36CAC312A14AD74CC6C022532:r "Please, Peter, will you rush
$35 or more right now to win the final race of 2022?")_**

Onward to victory,

Herschel Walker

subject: Biden's decision had terrible consequences for America's children.
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974804:6VmvJbGyN:m:1:3350876382:346EEC91F95C36AD056718EE5D0049A7:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974804:6VmvJbGyN:m:1:3350876382:346EEC91F95C36AD056718EE5D0049A7:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: This is why Republicans lost in Pennsylvania...
body:
This is why Republicans lost...
| | | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IQsAZ3ndMZBn1Ciya7torr5IWGBiyQc_uHp46iZpHTBQNHVwPMxdcSIIZKqkL4GTIq3v9K8s0Onqx3x-rPnnzr29p47MIcue_vFKduqGXBbOFLkQdGf3m7GBchRcHstmGeyhcJJfYfkGoo-XWf3FXA==&c=WxHb8PKipS5_l-qn_FjkfZya65zsotW7qwq2sCsPEtWjK8c4ZcabeQ==&ch=qaVLK7JzqpwImHl86pIjiyJ1NaOiuKYAhtJq3KK_Z8PnUUobU-qCpg==)
---
|
---
# This is why Republicans lost...
---
|
---
| |
### We don't have a message EXCEPT vitriol...

We have all of the puzzle pieces to create an epic story to present to the American people of who we are, of how far we've fallen under the Biden Administration, and what is needed to get us back on track. Unfortunately, during the midterm elections what we witnessed instead are Republicans utter lack of commitment to that story which resulted in a lack of a clear and concise message beyond gushes of fury, bitter criticism, and lies - especially in the Primary elections. Republicans have the best story to tell but either we consistently pick the worse people to tell it, or we hide from it all together. This is one of [MANY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IQsAZ3ndMZBn1Ciya7torr5IWGBiyQc_uHp46iZpHTBQNHVwPMxdcY5HFG7i2RAwPm-W2wEWPMfUPToEoHwghKfOIZd3S1-XX7HUMnNervjCgILKAkjneL3JTh8M-Q3VIb83wbNEDKl8tivgOeNw0pdA-9AvTSZARa8EDiozgdJSp0ubdFPNCLKE_g0ODYtFVM7R6XNP8WuFOcVhtv88V413PoPSMsUddARAOk9UrT3tm0Qf_mP9ig==&c=WxHb8PKipS5_l-qn_FjkfZya65zsotW7qwq2sCsPEtWjK8c4ZcabeQ==&ch=qaVLK7JzqpwImHl86pIjiyJ1NaOiuKYAhtJq3KK_Z8PnUUobU-qCpg==) reasons why Republicans lost so big in Pennsylvania and in many other races across our nation.
Here is just one example of bitterness on full display: just one week after November 8th's election and a seismic shift in Pennsylvania's office holders, Carla Sands felt it necessary to call me a racist. Yes, me - a BLACK woman who has the blood of slaves coursing through her veins. This ignorant remark was completely unprovoked, by the way, since I don't think or comment about her at all.
If you followed my campaign during the 2022 Senate Primary in PA, then you know I never entered into these types of sophomoric rants about my opponents. My messaging was always focused and surgical. I had little time and money to waste.
Even when Carla Sands and Jeff Bartos allowed Sean Hannity to pimp them out before the world to feign moral outrage over me running for Senate, I never once responded in-kind. I kept my focus on you and I kept my character intact.
Carla Sands says she's a Christian. Well, this unprovoked attack on me isn't very Christ-like behavior.
Carla Sands says she's a Conservative. Well, I only know of Democrats who go around hurling the "racist" word at people - again, completely unprovoked.
---
| |
---
|
### So, what do we do?

Throughout my campaign, I made it abundantly clear that I DO NOT believe many of our elected "leaders" are incentivized to do the right things JUST BECAUSE THEY'RE THE RIGHT THINGS TO DO. Most are completely self-consumed.
In almost every room I walked into, I said repeatedly that our help in getting our country back on track is NOT coming from the top down. After November 8th's abysmal election performance and after analyzing how Republican leadership behaved, I am even more convinced that the help we are looking for will come from the grassroots up - from people like you and me.
---
| In 2 years, Carla Sands will most likely try another run for Senate against Senator Bob Casey. Apparently, having [95%](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IQsAZ3ndMZBn1Ciya7torr5IWGBiyQc_uHp46iZpHTBQNHVwPMxdcY5HFG7i2RAwYxwwT0vfuk-cp09bnAbws6zjThJwfW8mMB-4NGlE9mwcvFyetCM6SJ0sCq434eVgri6bN5pDa_38cZGrH9R_NkhA-s2giUaVlOUminfG3B9_BFx6oCjCvBd9s8nDIZ7h&c=WxHb8PKipS5_l-qn_FjkfZya65zsotW7qwq2sCsPEtWjK8c4ZcabeQ==&ch=qaVLK7JzqpwImHl86pIjiyJ1NaOiuKYAhtJq3KK_Z8PnUUobU-qCpg==) of the Republican base vote against Carla Sands is not enough of a message to her that she's completely out of touch with reality.
---
| |
### Demand better...

Start now in demanding better from those who say they want to represent us. We just got our proverbial behinds handed to us. The losses in Pennsylvania are incomprehensible to any rational and fact-based person. It should have never happened. But it did.
If we, THE VOTERS, don't learn the lesson now, then I fear we many never learn it. What more do these people have to do to us before we demand better not from Democrats, but from ourselves and from those who say they want to represent us.
Start by clicking [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IQsAZ3ndMZBn1Ciya7torr5IWGBiyQc_uHp46iZpHTBQNHVwPMxdcY5HFG7i2RAwTXjVXbE012pIa3Zprr122XIjjRGfrT-K3jqOTQlbTgvewyenFA_QdMQJ374A_7fq7m6GCxOf8sMCdDWfLyxK6wUeIagmpCeQ&c=WxHb8PKipS5_l-qn_FjkfZya65zsotW7qwq2sCsPEtWjK8c4ZcabeQ==&ch=qaVLK7JzqpwImHl86pIjiyJ1NaOiuKYAhtJq3KK_Z8PnUUobU-qCpg==) to let[ Carla Sands ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IQsAZ3ndMZBn1Ciya7torr5IWGBiyQc_uHp46iZpHTBQNHVwPMxdcY5HFG7i2RAwTXjVXbE012pIa3Zprr122XIjjRGfrT-K3jqOTQlbTgvewyenFA_QdMQJ374A_7fq7m6GCxOf8sMCdDWfLyxK6wUeIagmpCeQ&c=WxHb8PKipS5_l-qn_FjkfZya65zsotW7qwq2sCsPEtWjK8c4ZcabeQ==&ch=qaVLK7JzqpwImHl86pIjiyJ1NaOiuKYAhtJq3KK_Z8PnUUobU-qCpg==)know you demand better from her if she think she's fit to represent us.
~Blessings and take care of each other~

P.S., I know with a high degree of certainty that every single Republican in the PA Primary asked persistently for Club for Growth's financial support, including Carla Sands. They picked me. Susan B. Anthony also picked me to support financially.
---
| |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IQsAZ3ndMZBn1Ciya7torr5IWGBiyQc_uHp46iZpHTBQNHVwPMxdcaSCPhmBmnNYax8hR2MKQLE15Tc32gJXTBhjpoFGPfQDz6IXD4jZ17ZiCrRKeHL58k0e83gsz1ASsvLLs3sJ3K8PlF2s4NDHxVXT0WDWp-H26jzNiwp0SJLmIphTyHOCufdIJBZsW3bc&c=WxHb8PKipS5_l-qn_FjkfZya65zsotW7qwq2sCsPEtWjK8c4ZcabeQ==&ch=qaVLK7JzqpwImHl86pIjiyJ1NaOiuKYAhtJq3KK_Z8PnUUobU-qCpg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IQsAZ3ndMZBn1Ciya7torr5IWGBiyQc_uHp46iZpHTBQNHVwPMxdcdCY2ODjN2b8ixfyV0qG-r9KNU2w0seI3JWbDnwbLRok2I2IztM7lLEeENC2UmE3EEXPFYICrlGeBKbowVRvsGk8LMWt8-MalBGUdjnC3OkC&c=WxHb8PKipS5_l-qn_FjkfZya65zsotW7qwq2sCsPEtWjK8c4ZcabeQ==&ch=qaVLK7JzqpwImHl86pIjiyJ1NaOiuKYAhtJq3KK_Z8PnUUobU-qCpg==)
---

clean_body: This is why Republicans lost... | | | | | == | This is why Republicans lost... | | | We don't have a message EXCEPT vitriol... We have all of the puzzle pieces to create an epic story to present to the American people of who we are, of how far we've fallen under the Biden Administration, and what is needed to get us back on track. Unfortunately, during the midterm elections what we witnessed instead are Republicans utter lack of commitment to that story which resulted in a lack of a clear and concise message beyond gushes of fury, bitter criticism, and lies - especially in the Primary elections. Republicans have the best story to tell but either we consistently pick the worse people to tell it, or we hide from it all together. This is one of == reasons why Republicans lost so big in Pennsylvania and in many other races across our nation. Here is just one example of bitterness on full display: just one week after November 8th's election and a seismic shift in Pennsylvania's office holders, Carla Sands felt it necessary to call me a racist. Yes, me - a BLACK woman who has the blood of slaves coursing through her veins. This ignorant remark was completely unprovoked, by the way, since I don't think or comment about her at all. If you followed my campaign during the 2022 Senate Primary in PA, then you know I never entered into these types of sophomoric rants about my opponents. My messaging was always focused and surgical. I had little time and money to waste. Even when Carla Sands and Jeff Bartos allowed Sean Hannity to pimp them out before the world to feign moral outrage over me running for Senate, I never once responded in-kind. I kept my focus on you and I kept my character intact. Carla Sands says she's a Christian. Well, this unprovoked attack on me isn't very Christ-like behavior. Carla Sands says she's a Conservative. Well, I only know of Democrats who go around hurling the "racist" word at people - again, completely unprovoked. | | | So, what do we do? Throughout my campaign, I made it abundantly clear that I DO NOT believe many of our elected "leaders" are incentivized to do the right things JUST BECAUSE THEY'RE THE RIGHT THINGS TO DO. Most are completely self-consumed. In almost every room I walked into, I said repeatedly that our help in getting our country back on track is NOT coming from the top down. After November 8th's abysmal election performance and after analyzing how Republican leadership behaved, I am even more convinced that the help we are looking for will come from the grassroots up - from people like you and me. | In 2 years, Carla Sands will most likely try another run for Senate against Senator Bob Casey. Apparently, having == of the Republican base vote against Carla Sands is not enough of a message to her that she's completely out of touch with reality. | | Demand better... Start now in demanding better from those who say they want to represent us. We just got our proverbial behinds handed to us. The losses in Pennsylvania are incomprehensible to any rational and fact-based person. It should have never happened. But it did. If we, THE VOTERS, don't learn the lesson now, then I fear we many never learn it. What more do these people have to do to us before we demand better not from Democrats, but from ourselves and from those who say they want to represent us. Start by clicking == to let you demand better from her if she think she's fit to represent us. ~Blessings and take care of each other~ P.S., I know with a high degree of certainty that every single Republican in the PA Primary asked persistently for Club for Growth's financial support, including Carla Sands. They picked me. Susan B. Anthony also picked me to support financially. | | | == == | == | == | == "I am free now and choose to remain so." ~ Oney Judge Staines | == | == donated Thanksgiving Dinner to a family in need in the Pottstown area. | == | ---|--- | | | | | | | Kathy Barnette | P.O. name: Draft DeSantis
subject: Peter, look at the damage Biden caused 👉
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974822:65lifbGeN:m:1:3359512271:F1977DF1233951586A855DD40386825B:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974822:65lifbGeN:m:1:3359512271:F1977DF1233951586A855DD40386825B:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974822:65lifbGeN:m:1:3359512271:F1977DF1233951586A855DD40386825B:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

I've got some exciting news.

I'm releasing a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

My new book, **" Never Give An Inch,"** contains untold stories you don't want to miss.

**My negotiations with Kim Jong Un, the night we took out Qasem Soleimani, my work rescuing American hostages, and much, much more are _ALL_ detailed in my new book.**

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=89280b08713f4499be16a741c6b4f95f&_e=3objb_pgEgaWOrD9U1JEdfdxTQvmnwju2a2jokREaPVbQm-U_85f33LBW64W0yzns2FwwM6VeNygaGEOLaGSNMZt0vYAYYQy3kAKMdedI5CE5xityBZoEGHqaELioS_FDXEBfP-nyZakJShQbt1hwPHAmMCTryh0MypyYyEq3tFfpoXRdTduGJYNDCRCTN2EjumSQcaiYEeQIQ4Jxe-ZT3mzAfNVWSYrMkZWhkSPM69-pNLrvZb9GhdEpz-wISnhWDKGheKxeEk0H1a_N8xEjlgsoqIodRBfucd7GcwUu-uv0lPMFxjke1heRAwgIqI1a_t1bZKS9USkoXyLyD-3KElNKkjqRxxZWDzEcSSP2mU6Udo7cBIixMG7Q8DrXttZio_trTHl_T-kCZICztu5FQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4147c2e6b0454c91a0b3ff241214dc01&_e=C6CXBGqDHqYUykZkPMuc43slyUgC10rlzJiRMNX7SwH-YN3pnwgAj7-6V73jp3Yy85TwuvuLTT_t0E6_zR0tg77hh4P8HwSFfs913x4tuGcWJ7tXIZyP5XuqVuvBkThP3xX1aCF7oCYOg9U0cGs6CCO9cnR3VAZv6yMZpYML3ZxNilht1UFYhMflp37kTtSggpQ1l0aYAKm6ZenV65ifUE_BjMbKZ6O8Y3mZEjRpE11dX_Ql-5Oa-eLE7K1IrW-9f4hcdQdKr8eMZYdvssyj2Awz0x8PhhWjQ4NklNmgf-ntVCxuHRmE39O8uGClQrkLiKvRt17jscx8Uaj_9VnGdw-AYjtgp2BSn6ASU7pe_EjlpJrg9komshOmvhx0Lm0eVkzkNUGYbtXh_CCqF4Khxw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4147c2e6b0454c91a0b3ff241214dc01&_e=C6CXBGqDHqYUykZkPMuc43slyUgC10rlzJiRMNX7SwH-YN3pnwgAj7-6V73jp3Yy85TwuvuLTT_t0E6_zR0tg77hh4P8HwSFfs913x4tuGcWJ7tXIZyP5XuqVuvBkThP3xX1aCF7oCYOg9U0cGs6CCO9cnR3VAZv6yMZpYML3ZxNilht1UFYhMflp37kTtSggpQ1l0aYAKm6ZenV65ifUE_BjMbKZ6O8Y3mZEjRpE11dX_Ql-5Oa-eLE7K1IrW-9r110oRW15ELAf8WTXbwlsMszcq0VpTEZoKgA4RLDait619LBC74yPLHzbZ7lq7Pw0MGe009hKZD2RcamJKXQvso0oNdpWnkTyGD036P0JN5Sr-1q6XVyyMJA4-BZwwbKl1Ab3epDhdFni86nNNYANw%3D%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4147c2e6b0454c91a0b3ff241214dc01&_e=C6CXBGqDHqYUykZkPMuc43slyUgC10rlzJiRMNX7SwH-YN3pnwgAj7-6V73jp3Yy85TwuvuLTT_t0E6_zR0tg77hh4P8HwSFfs913x4tuGcWJ7tXIZyP5XuqVuvBkThP3xX1aCF7oCYOg9U0cGs6CCO9cnR3VAZv6yMZpYML3ZxNilht1UFYhMflp37kTtSggpQ1l0aYAKm6ZenV65ifUE_BjMbKZ6O8Y3mZEjRpE11dX_Ql-5Oa-eLE7K1IrW-91G4GNaeMZAQvqC_CdvFvC46gi0fl6BOXZxAsqrs7YwcNsEY1kq-IuZDqAmvzT--l1g4efaY0ZyqNzfU7U7HKmZSPRHiXt_JbYwUObZXSJM0FeK4ksMdnsa-wgruzxNzXfXK0p8r823A4CJdr4J2iuw%3D%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
51st Senate vote for Democrats
| | | | |

It is something you can appreciate whether you worship as Reverend Warnock does, differently or not at all. _** **_Because this is how Senator Warnock sees our world. He provides inspiration, sees the good in all of us and fights to improve challenges and eradicate suffering. Really, he's the very best of us._**
---

|

| | | | | | [**Donate: Warnock for Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ted96bae1-cfc5-4ba2-992b-5fe27e1e8ff4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Cliff

We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: U.S. Marine illegally arrested by FBI gets 8 months in prison
body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington,
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlu7j3fbsggsg74p44t56lr4mt0lgls9qsguh088_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdim0or3c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uoq6fdr7m2qr1cdlciob5cr1m4r62t74morb2tjmmmpr2ojhcoo63c3ledrm4o37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfcjhcpoj9ddgcup7cphks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zocrpgasme988vnsr5csqk2k3513mdiilcfvhj20_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdim0or3c9h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zglojak8479s4lish2mh99qrdgj53ie08qa4p7vo_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdim0or3c9h2bs) Hi Patriot,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zg3f8ed27fe4pb1ejik7c7nkumkdo5c6le0hcn8o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdim0or3c9h2bs)**

(Because you're a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you've seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn't protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn't attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.**

Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn't receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden's Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What 's more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.**

Let me tell you, I've locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She's a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She's the absolute worst judge I've appeared before in 45 years.

And now she's throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Friend, I 've filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera - and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.**

I'm suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus' home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can't be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvk3f82fnlr6knkglelle26a58tk9pb5sndvr9ag_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdim0or3c9h2bs)

I'm using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

[**Please give what you can right away.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbn24eokg6ckoermfdq8q44oapheglcp5c788uj0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdim0or3c9h2bs)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Friend, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just[clicking on this link](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztci6sm0nvddcgdsqtcu8m81cplomqch44soq8r8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdim0or3c9h2bs) and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

[**Then think of U.S. Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera and each of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters I 'm fighting for...and dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3jrm2rho9qp5vq6v4odh0bu9aooa8059pbv4398_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdim0or3c9h2bs)

**
