clean_body: We need to stop a doomsday scenario in the Georgia runoff. | Peter, Georgia will forever hold a special place in my heart. When I became the first Republican in history to win Georgia's 6th congressional district, I knew The Peach State would play a pivotal role in our elections for decades to come. And right now in Georgia 's runoff election, Herschel Walker is our only hope of stopping Joe Biden and Kamala Harris from gaining a 51-seat Senate majority. That 's why George Soros has spent a FORTUNE in Georgia to attack Herschel and effectively hand the most radical Senate majority in history to Biden and Kamala on a silver platter. But Herschel has something these left-wing cronies NEVER will - grassroots patriots like YOU. Soros' fortune isn't the only warchest Herschel is having to fend off in the final days of this race, Peter. Every left-wing megadonor from across the country is pouring unprecedented amounts of money into Georgia to try and stop him. And even before the runoff, radical liberal Raphael Warnock had OUTRAISED Herschel 2:1 in the final stretch of the general election. Now, to put an end to this trend and give Herschel the final boost he needs to WIN, he 's counting on YOU to come up big for him before this last deadline. Thank you, Newt Gingrich Paid for by the Georgia Republican Party, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee P.O. name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Soros is gunning for Herschel Walker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Georgia Republican Party, Inc
body:
We need to stop a doomsday scenario in the Georgia runoff. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c6409%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=U5k9%2f6lMQtfXAITqZEVQHQ&sysid=1)
We need to stop a doomsday scenario in the Georgia runoff.
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84002%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fpa8kj5qaSTa4zw4iVgAiQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend, Georgia will forever hold a special place in my heart.
---
When I became the first Republican in history to win Georgia's 6th congressional district, I knew The Peach State would play a pivotal role in our elections for decades to come.
---
_And right now in Georgia’s runoff election, Herschel Walker is our only hope of stopping Joe Biden and Kamala Harris from gaining a 51-seat Senate majority._
---
**_That’s why George Soros has spent a FORTUNE in Georgia to attack Herschel and effectively hand the most radical Senate majority in history to Biden and Kamala on a silver platter._**
---
But Herschel has something these left-wing cronies NEVER will - grassroots patriots like YOU.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to the Runoff Victory Fund before the FINAL end-of-month deadline to help Herschel FIGHT BACK and FLIP this seat.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84003%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IohrLkFs852AWkCD7pEEjg&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84002%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fpa8kj5qaSTa4zw4iVgAiQ&sysid=1)
---

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84002%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fpa8kj5qaSTa4zw4iVgAiQ&sysid=1)
---

Soros’ fortune isn’t the only warchest Herschel is having to fend off in the final days of this race, Friend.
---
Every left-wing megadonor from across the country is pouring unprecedented amounts of money into Georgia to try and stop him.
---
**_And even before the runoff, radical liberal Raphael Warnock had OUTRAISED Herschel 2:1 in the final stretch of the general election._**
---
_Now, to put an end to this trend and give Herschel the final boost he needs to WIN, he’s counting on YOU to come up big for him before this last deadline._
---
[**So please, make a grassroots contribution to the Runoff Victory Fund before the FINAL end-of-month deadline to ensure Herschel has every last dollar he needs to FLIP this seat.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c84004%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sf%2bVuGfpStOjpXY%2fnLjqew&sysid=1)

Dear Peter, Next year is going to be critical for Oregon's environment, which is why we are getting started now. The 2023 Legislative Session begins in January and legislators will be considering several bills that will have a huge impact on our future. We need your help now to ensure that we have the resources we need to protect our climate and environment, and defend against threats to our progress. **[Your investment in OLCV this Giving Tuesday will help us start 2023 strong. Give today and your gift will be matched!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55206780/381000479/419990679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxZDZiYzA2LTVhNmYtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1ODU4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rfhNHgaxeKbO1OZt4tf3y4ru1RiZBg_KsmnThNQV0rA=&emci=af990dda-546f-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=f1d6bc06-5a6f-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=2107230) ** We've made some incredible progress this year, including electing climate champion Tina Kotek to be our next governor. **But winning elections is only the first step. Now we have to get to work ensuring that those wins turn into action for our climate and environment.** We are entering into a new era with a new governor, new leadership, and new legislators. When the legislature convenes in January, we will be there every day making sure that we continue to make progress to protect our climate, our clean air and water, our strong land use protections, and more. **[Will you help us hit the ground running in 2023 by making a donation today? Give now and your gift will be doubled! Or start a new monthly donation and have your impact tripled!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55206781/381000480/419990679?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYxZDZiYzA2LTVhNmYtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1ODU4ZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rfhNHgaxeKbO1OZt4tf3y4ru1RiZBg_KsmnThNQV0rA=&emci=af990dda-546f-ed11-819c-00224825858d&emdi=f1d6bc06-5a6f-ed11-819c-00224825858d&ceid=2107230) ** Thank you for your continued investment in our work. Together, we have accomplished so much. Sincerely,
April Christenson

clean_body: Double (or triple) your gift's impact! | | | | ---|--- | | Dear Peter, Next year is going to be critical for Oregon's environment, which is why we are getting started now. The 2023 Legislative Session begins in January and legislators will be considering several bills that will have a huge impact on our future. We need your help now to ensure that we have the resources we need to protect our climate and environment, and defend against threats to our progress. We've made some incredible progress this year, including electing climate champion Tina Kotek to be our next governor. But winning elections is only the first step. Now we have to get to work ensuring that those wins turn into action for our climate and environment. We are entering into a new era with a new governor, new leadership, and new legislators. When the legislature convenes in January, we will be there every day making sure that we continue to make progress to protect our climate, our clean air and water, our strong land use protections, and more. Thank you for your continued investment in our work. Together, we have accomplished so much. Sincerely, April Christenson OLCV Development Director | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. _ | ---|---

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: Here's why Whitmer swept the GOP away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Rural voters made the difference | | | Hi Peter – In case you didn't follow the Michigan governor's race closely, Gretchen Whitmer won re-election against an anti-abortion GOP extremist. Her double-digit win is a testament to a strategy that directly appealed to rural voters. **Whitmer ran a campaign that focused on linking the issues of civil rights and the economy, arguing that when everyone has access to education, voting, child care, and reproductive rights, we**** _all_****do better.** We're proud to have endorsed Gov. Whitmer and helped her win in a state at the heart of the GOP's culture war. Just 8 years ago, in the 2016 election, Michigan flipped red. Today, we expanded Democrats' margins by organizing rural voters and making sure that Democrats prioritized issues that would benefit rural communities. Gov. Whitmer is already demonstrating how she will do just that, appointing the first Black woman to Michigan's Supreme Court and prioritizing LGBTQ+ protections, common sense gun safety measures, and protecting the right to an abortion. **We look forward to continuing to work with Gov. Whitmer and Michigan rural Democrats to continue fighting for a better future.** Thank you, Peter, for your support in our efforts to elect Democrats like Gov. Whitmer. \-- United Rural Democrats
---

United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. **Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?**

body:

---
**BREAKING: Raphael Warnock Raised $52 Million**
Fellow American, that's how much our Democrat opponent raised in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff.

**That's a lot of money. He _significantly_ outraised us.**

**Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle!**

There are just 8 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. We're calling on all conservatives to step up before it's too late. _**[Will you help us close the financial gap immediately?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9ijtfje6qlkvg3p1gk5cn599mg3h2p4jr7qqj20_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdimapr1c1h2bs)**_

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: Two reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Folks, There are just 2 days until November comes to a close, so today I’m reaching out to ask if you will support us with a donation toward our $10,000 fundraising goal. Here are two quick reasons why I’m asking for $2:
1. The _Respect for Marriage Act_ is so close to becoming law. We need all hands on deck to make sure we send it to President Biden’s desk.
2. With a little over a month before the year ends, we are looking ahead to 2023 and we need resources to continue delivering lasting results for everyday families.

Donations from emails like this one are key to our work. Whether it is $2, $5, or more, your donation will fuel the work we can do in the weeks ahead. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: U.S. Marine illegally arrested by FBI gets 8 months in prison
body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7583%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Q71EvR1is%2fRYr1U0D7Tf%2bg&sysid=1)
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. | | | [ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77213%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7PCwOB6WByzozH%2fO3LFT7A&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77214%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kJ62YvWKMa4Cu2nLnRo4ow&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77225%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kppKtrmMCixDf%2fO8QWJ5OQ&sysid=1)**

(Because you’re a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you’ve seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn’t protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn’t attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I’ve locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.

And now she’s throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Patriot, I’ve filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera - and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I’m suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus’ home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77226%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=il8EGBA9K2EIpZnFh1c7Ng&sysid=1)
I’m using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

[**Please give what you can right away.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77227%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PNCe8qbOdvdNCtUOZ6huPg&sysid=1)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just[clicking on this link](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77228%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rzwr316%2bBi0zibVQAQmxxg&sysid=1) and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

[**Then think of U.S. Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera and each of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters I’m fighting for ...and dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77229%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=keB5vHgeyx5PIq8n7XAKTQ&sysid=1)

**
---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7583%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Q71EvR1is%2fRYr1U0D7Tf%2bg&sysid=1)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20P.=20Bradley?=
subject: We can save our elections
body:
We just got breaking news too | | | |
---
Peter,In a **LANDMARK DECISION** , the 9th Circuit has ruled that Election Integrity Project® California (EIPCa), many recent and future congressional candidates and I, James P. Bradley as the Co-Lead Plaintiff, _**have standing to challenge the constitutionality of California’s election laws, regulations, policies and procedures that have weakened or removed integrity from the election process.**_**This is great news because, without fair elections we no longer live in a constitutional republic; we live in an authoritarian dictatorship.** For context, witness the recent Arizona elections **WHICH ARE STILL BEING COUNTED** because **Katie Hobbs** , the Democrat gubernatorial candidate **WHOSE OFFICE RUNS THAT ELECTION** doesn't want to allow **Kari Lake** , her Republican opponent, to win.**IT’S THAT SIMPLE: DEMOCRATS GAME THE RULES TO SIDESTEP THE WILL OF THE PEOPLE, AND WE MUST BAND TOGETHER TO FIGHT BACK!!!** Our lawsuit is big because it is the first to challenge the constitutionality of California's election laws and procedures. We are the first to get past standing. If we win, California will be required to enforce secure and uniform vote casting and vote counting procedures.
| [DONATE NOW: HELP US FUND THIS LAWSUIT!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d70799eac9&e=fdefed58de)
---
We all remember how we felt watching **President Trump** being pushed out of office in 2020, ‘beaten’ by a senile old man who barely even ran a campaign. We knew it was wrong then, and we know it's wrong today when voting districts across the country are **STILL PRETENDING TO COUNT THEIR VOTES WEEKS LATER.****MY TEAM AND I WILL MAKE VOTING FAIR AGAIN, but we need your support to stay in the fight!** This lawsuit that I’m fighting against the**Secretary of State, Attorney General and Governor of California** is quite possibly the most important legal action taking place in the country, because...**Without fair elections we don’t have AMERICA; we have Joe Biden’s crappy socialist version of America — AND WE THE PEOPLE DESERVE BETTER THAN THAT!**_[**If you’re as outraged as I am and want to sleep soundly knowing that when you vote your vote will be counted, please donate $50, $25, $10 — whatever you can, because lawsuits like this are expensive to fight and killer to win!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=0a12309b12&e=fdefed58de)_**SUPPORT THIS BATTLE IF YOU WANT A RETURN TO:**
* _**NO universal mail-in**_
* _**No Drop-boxes**_
* _**Mandatory voter ID**_
* _**NO BALLOT HARVESTING!**_

EVERYTHING**Joe Biden** has done since his first day in office has been a SLAP IN THE FACE to Americans, and if you’re still feeling the sting of being cheated in 2020 then _**THIS IS A CAUSE YOU’LL WANT TO SUPPORT**_ to keep a nightmare like **Biden** from ever happening again.**Again my name is James P. Bradley, and thank you in advance for pitching in and helping out!**

| [DONATE NOW: HELP US FUND THIS LAWSUIT!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=507f553308&e=fdefed58de)
---
|

|
---
|
---
|

American Conservatives United1900 Market StPhiladelphia, PA 19103

Some of the best things come from down south - and right now, Georgia's own Herschel Walker needs our help!

finish line?")_**

body:

---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zino1c07c8c31vtjdlelflrdtbuf2pk5vucpakjg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhm6pb2cph2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrk4v3q6u4nm6f24ne3cur1fq8fl2irtdudhg610_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhm6pb2cph2bs)
---

---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbh52l45bm5a8otkd8q172d4eqgo0er2ia3rccv0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhm6pb2cph2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zagukuq6appu7c95sc8l9hcotptnvp613l5r4548_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhm6pb2cph2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc25775823qm88eie1u1ege1v9rs8diorqcof3pg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhm6pb2cph2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Kari Lake
subject: My message to the People of Arizona & the United States:
body:
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsim4kshb99407q2b7vu2ruc1sd6udfj8ijo1too_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmco72cdh2bs)
---

To the People of Arizona and of the United States:

A few weeks ago, Elections in Arizona officially started when Mail-In Ballots were sent out across our State. Election Day was just a few weeks ago, and Maricopa County is STILL counting ballots.

Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history.

Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures.

Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair.

Thankfully, the Attorney General's office is demanding answers from Maricopa County. Attorney General Mark Brnovich is taking the first steps necessary to remedy this assault on our Democracy.

This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country.

Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were.

I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections.

| [**STAND WITH KARI LAKE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrj0v07qlp4h70u8ub98831mm4uj75ddfrqje6ug_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmco72cdh2bs)
---

Thank You,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5pp7lp8espup4l0bagvesfnog6ovgivsbuq74so_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmco72cdh2bs)

Kari Lake
Candidate for Arizona Governor

* * *
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zettrcd1u3lrgm1qbq30vcue4in6sh0p80rohr2g_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmco72cdh2bs)

[ ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zct66l5cgnjtapcr5dsrqove2k82gvg40iimg5n8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmco72cdh2bs)

body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61977668:J2AkNuG7N:m:1:3371220873:5B61FE84072FF0C75BD489C6A40D41C4:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61977668:J2AkNuG7N:m:1:3371220873:5B61FE84072FF0C75BD489C6A40D41C4:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61977668:J2AkNuG7N:m:1:3371220873:5B61FE84072FF0C75BD489C6A40D41C4:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

Friend – I'm fired up!
Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.
But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $52 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.**

**That's why we set an ambitious $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal – so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win. **But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.

**[So, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help us hit our final end-of-month goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55194509/380952825/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5097-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI4M2NjNS0zNTZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5Lunm3i3yYGPAACu6JMX8zxbiqL2VnU6i9J4qxdveo=)**

**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Rev. Raphael Warnock:** Friend – thank you. I’m grateful to have grassroots folks like you standing alongside me in our critical fights for justice. But now, we’re in a runoff election against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate – and I need your help to win.

Our entire Democratic agenda – from protecting voting rights to restoring reproductive freedom – is on the line in this race. That’s why Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are flooding Georgia with millions to defeat me. We need to fight back now – but I don't take a dime from corporate PACs, so I'm fully relying on your grassroots support to power this campaign to victory.

If you’re with me, _[**please donate now to defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55194514/380952830/-1468610671?refcode=jtk5097-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGI4M2NjNS0zNTZmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNTg1OGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k5Lunm3i3yYGPAACu6JMX8zxbiqL2VnU6i9J4qxdveo=)_. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| _By chipping in to this email, you're donating to help Raphael Warnock in his tough race and to help Dan Kildee hit the ground running in the next campaign cycle._ In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a donor for our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. **But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it.**

My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator.

Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. **That’s why I have to ask:**

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a donor for our runoff campaign to keep Georgia blue. But first, let me explain why your support is so critical – and what could happen without it. My story is only possible here. You see, I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. I had 11 brothers and sisters, and grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. But from there, I went on to serve as the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church and represent Georgians as their first-ever Black senator. Now, I'm running for reelection to make sure every child can achieve their American dream just like I did. We can win this fight for a better, brighter future for all, but not without support from grassroots folks like you. That’s why I have to ask: = = I'll be blunt: Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – is on the line in this race. We’re getting ready for the new year, we’re gearing up for the holidays, and we’re ready to **lead in our House majority in the 118th Congress.**

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA Nov. 28th: Send a few texts to win the Senate runoff in GA!
body:
| | | |
---
---
The only action we are asking you to take this week is to help us turn out conservative voters in Georgia for the Senate runoff. This is so, so important – please help if you can! If everyone helps out a little bit, we will get it done!
---
| | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
**There are still several early voting days, plus Election Day, in the Georgia Senate runoff.** It is critical that we deprive the radical left of this extra vote and that we have a more evenly divided Senate. Please help us turn out conservative voters by texting them from the comfort of your own home! **You do not need to live in Georgia to help!** This means you can live anywhere and help from home. Last time there was a Senate runoff in Georgia, it didn't go our way, and Biden was able to do whatever he wanted. We must do everything we can to win this seat so that we can preserve the filibuster. Anything can happen in two years. If a sitting Senator leaves office for whatever reason, we will be better off if the Senate is 50-50 rather than 51-49. If a Democrat left office in a state with a Republican governor, that governor could potentially appoint a Republican serve out the term and Republicans would take control of the chamber. _The national media will now say this race doesn't matter, but that couldn't be further from the truth!_ If you want to help, please take a few minutes to text Georgia voters and ask them to vote. That's it! All you have to do to begin, is go to [**tpp.me/textvoters**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjIzMzItODQ3NzViMjViNjkyNDQxMWE5NTE1Y2Q4NmY1NjJjY2QiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHBwLm1lL3RleHR2b3RlcnM_bWlkPTQ2MTMxJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/n97S2ark2bcED_jNIquxiQ) and register. You will be asked for your cell phone number, your name, and your email address. Then just click on the button that says “Start Texting!”
---
[TEXT VOTERS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._wgFppq-A)
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._jyHnZoP83Nf33AXzBzt5A)
---

Last time there was a Senate runoff in Georgia, it didn't go our way, and Biden was able to do whatever he wanted. We must do everything we can to win this seat so that we can preserve the filibuster. Anything can happen in two years. If a sitting Senator leaves office for whatever reason, we will be better off if the Senate is 50-50 rather than 51-49. If a Democrat left office in a state with a Republican governor, that governor could potentially appoint a Republican serve out the term and Republicans would take control of the chamber. The national media will now say this race doesn't matter, but that couldn't be further from the truth! If you want to help, please take a few minutes to text Georgia voters and ask them to vote. That's it! All you have to do to begin, is go to and register. You will be asked for your cell phone number, your name, and your email address. Then just click on the button that says “Start Texting!” | | | | | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. | | © 2022 , All rights reserved. 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 |

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv3sof70oenov8k3p9mtmji0q4258uccfaf1fsk8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhm9oj4c1h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd21m5fc0gcso9labosio0h9nko1c0iu8q1e6np0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhm9oj4c1h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpmpdgl9f61apvipee1pnf0v0e3af2hjlldp9mt0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhm9oj4c1h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z49b6lumbdipfk020vkk18soe77qhmm6ohtjt3a0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcnoj85b3n0019i10hk3v2l97a1qia5iclnte110_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3cjhm6p72chg649fg)

When I became the first Republican in history to win Georgia's 6th congressional district, I knew The Peach State would play a pivotal role in our elections for decades to come. And right now in Georgia 's runoff election, Herschel Walker is our only hope of stopping Joe Biden and Kamala Harris from gaining a 51-seat Senate majority. That 's why George Soros has spent a FORTUNE in Georgia to attack Herschel and effectively hand the most radical Senate majority in history to Biden and Kamala on a silver platter. But Herschel has something these left-wing cronies NEVER will - grassroots patriots like YOU. Soros' fortune isn't the only warchest Herschel is having to fend off in the final days of this race, Friend. Every left-wing megadonor from across the country is pouring unprecedented amounts of money into Georgia to try and stop him. And even before the runoff, radical liberal Raphael Warnock had OUTRAISED Herschel 2:1 in the final stretch of the general election. Now, to put an end to this trend and give Herschel the final boost he needs to WIN, he 's counting on YOU to come up big for him before this last deadline. name: Jameson Ellis
subject: This is my being vulnerable, Peter...
body:
(please read this in it's entirety)

Peter,

I hope this email finds you well.

Would it be okay if I take just a few minutes to get a little

**personal** and

**vulnerable** with you?

The reason I ask is because this email is going to be a bit longer than
usual because of what I'm going to share... but if you never read
through any of my emails,

**please read this one through to the bitter end** - it will probably
be the single most important email I've ever sent.

First and foremost, thank you for your prayers, your support and for
being engaged enough... for

**caring** enough... to open this email and

**actually** read it.

**Let me start off by saying this...**

As you may know (or not know), I send these emails from a tool called
ActiveCampaign.

One of the features of this service is the ability to send newsletter
style emails... but also the ability to leverage my efforts to send more
"personalized" emails like this one that make it appear as if I'm
emailing you

**personally**... but in all reality, this email is being sent to
hundreds of people, personalized with their names in it as well.

I'm sure you knew that, but then again you may not have.

That being said,

**I have a confession to make**...

I'm nothing special.

I'm

**not** an answer to prayers... I'm not a savior, a Jesus Christ, a
Donald J. Trump, or the Easter bunny.

I'm just an imperfect, rough around the edges middle-class citizen that
was asleep at the wheel

****until****... 2020 happened.

When I made the decision to run for Congress, it was because it was
something I believed God was calling me to do, and if I'm being
honest... it scared me to death.

Why?

Because

**I'm not a politician** nor did I know the first thing about
campaigning. None the less, I took time to pray about it and ask God
for confirmation.

But something else I did was take the time to

**count the cost** of what I was about to do.

I believe too many people jump into things without

**truly** counting the costs of how the decision they're about to make
may impact their families, their friends, their communities, and their
personal lives.

That being said, I was obedient to what I believe God was calling me to
and took a leap of faith... and both by the grace of God and support
from people like you, Peter, during the 2022 Texas Primaries
against Dan Crenshaw we were successful in taking 17% of his votes with
only two things:

* $45k raised

* 3 months to campaign

Not bad against a highly popular incumbent like Dan Crenshaw who raised
roughly $9M between January 2021 and February 2022.

But I'm not responsible for that... both

**the grace of God** and the

**support of patriots like you** are responsible for that.

And it's been humbling to know there are so many people who'd like me to
run again in 2024.

**So am I going to run for Congressional District 2 again so that we can
take all of this momentum we've built and finally unseat Dan Crenshaw?**

Here's the deal...

I'd

**really** like to.

That's the goal, anyway.

But here's the problem...

(and this is why he won the 2022 Texas Primary race)

Let's pretend for a moment that Dan Crenshaw and I are competing
businesses that have to get the word out about the products/services
that we offer.

Dan Crenshaw started his business back in 2017 and I didn't start mine
until 2021, which means he's been in business 4 years

**longer** than I have.

He's had time to

**really**

**establish** a brand, a business, a great marketing strategy, a
customer base, and even gain a ton of investor funding.

But since I didn't start my business until four years later, if I want
to compete against Crenshaw,

**I've got to work even harder** if I want to take enough marketshare to
be a real threat to his enterprise.

Oh, and I forgot to mention that when I started my business, I had to
start it on the side because,

**like you**, I

**still** have to keep a roof over my head and put food on the table.

The unfortunate reality is that no matter how bad his product or
customer service is, it's difficult to beat him whenever he has the
ability to outspend you 200 to 1.

**Yeah, you read that right.**

200 to 1.

**Think about it...**

He's got the money and power to hire employees, PR people, a marketing
team, and dispute the truth his competition is fighting to expose at a
ratio of 200:1.

That's the

**reality** what we're facing here, Peter.

And yet... our company (campaign) was still able to take 17% of his
market share.

**So the question becomes...** how do we take even more marketshare and
put Crenshaw out of business once and for all?

We're going to have to get creative. And in order to do that

**I need to be transparent with you**... we're not going to accomplish
it with $45k.

I'm going to need to turn the "

**side business**" (campaign) into a full-time business so that I no
longer have to split my focus between my career and my campaign...

IF we are

**truly** going to be successful, that is.

So there's two ways to do this...

* I can legally pay myself a salary from the campaign.

* I can earn enough in the private sector.

The first option is not a path I want to have to take because unlike
other candidates, I'm not in this to make money and get rich. Also, and
this is just my opinion, campaign contributions would be better
utilized for getting the word out to voters. After all, donors don't
really GET anything for their contributions

**except** the satisfaction in knowing that they donated financially to
a candidate they believe in.

The second option, in my humble opinion, is the way to go. Especially if
it provides real value and serves people in a meaningful way.

And so yesterday I made a monumental announcement about a new community
I started on Locals called "Jameson On Tap," and I don't mind telling
you that part of the reason I started this community is so that I can
make sure I can stay focused on politics and not have to split my
attention between my career and my campaign.

But you want to know what my ultimate goal is, Peter?

**I would like to be able to donate my entire congressional salary** to
veterans, first responders, and the mental health crisis as a result of
me earning enough in the private sector that I can afford to do so.

(Save this email - hold me accountable).

But that's not the

**only** purpose Jameson On Tap serves...

We all talk about how we need to wake people up, mobilize, equip
ourselves, and take clear and concise action...

And that's another reason I created this community.

The intent isn't for this to be just another community on Locals - the
intent is for

**YOUR** voice to be heard,

**YOUR** questions to get answered, and

**YOUR** actions to mean something.

**Let's have the hard conversations** that we're not allowed to have on
Fakebook or any of the other big-tech platforms.

**Let's mobilize** and

**build stronger relationships** with other patriots so that we can
unite, start taking action, and start taking our country back.

**Let's hear from and connect** with other patriots, thought leaders,
and elected officials so that we can finally start taking our country
back, little by little.

(As a matter of fact, my first guest interview will be with Chad Prather
on Thursday, December 8 at 7:00pm CST)

If I

**was** wealthy, I'd be more than happy to donate my time to make this
all happen... but I'm not wealthy. As a matter of fact, during the 2022
Primaries I lost a couple of clients and took a significant loss to my
income.

And you know what?

I

**still** haven't recovered completely.

But you know what else?

I

**still** make the decision to show up and fight, every single day.

Why?

Because everything in our lives... movies, football games, the kids
soccor games, vacations, wine-tasting, beer drinking, and $8 lattes...
none of it matters if we lose our country.

Our Founding Father's pledged to each other their lives, their fortunes,
and their sacred honor for the cause of liberty...

THAT is why I continue to show up every day and serve my community, my
district, my state, and my country.

But

**I can't do this alone** nor can I do it all for free at the expense of
my family being homeless and hungry.

I all but went broke running for office so it should be clear that I'm
not doing this to try and get rich... I'm doing this because

**I love my country** and want to be able to put 100% of my focus on
winning the fight to Restore Liberty and Preserve America... to unseat
Dan Crenshaw.

**But I need your help, Peter**.

Which is why I'm inviting you to not only become a member of Jamson On
Tap, but to become a paid supporter of Jameson On Tap at only $10 per
month.

That's one less trip to Whataburger each month.

One less latte...

One less bottle of wine...

I'm not going to guilt you into it by asking you, "Can I count on you?"

Instead, I'm just going to humbly ask you to

**tap in** by clicking the button below and supporting our movement.

Instead, I'm just going to humbly ask you to

**tap in** to help me reach a place where I can donate my entire
congressional salary to the causes that are important to people like you
and me.

If the button below doesn't work, click here instead:
https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqYW1lc29uZWxsaXMubG9jYWxzLmNvbQ==&sig=CoqYJyx5pzV3qU89y4JYVz1Q6CwzYYHAcQUVrBYKyt1u&iat=1669675571&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=116A138A1A951 <https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqYW1lc29uZWxsaXMubG9jYWxzLmNvbQ==&sig=CoqYJyx5pzV3qU89y4JYVz1Q6CwzYYHAcQUVrBYKyt1u&iat=1669675571&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=116A138A1A951>

clean_body: (please read this in it's entirety) Peter, I hope this email finds you well. Would it be okay if I take just a few minutes to get a little personal and vulnerable with you? The reason I ask is because this email is going to be a bit longer than usual because of what I'm going to share... but if you never read through any of my emails, please read this one through to the bitter end - it will probably be the single most important email I've ever sent. First and foremost, thank you for your prayers, your support and for being engaged enough... for caring enough... to open this email and actually read it. Let me start off by saying this... As you may know (or not know), I send these emails from a tool called ActiveCampaign. One of the features of this service is the ability to send newsletter style emails... but also the ability to leverage my efforts to send more "personalized" emails like this one that make it appear as if I'm emailing you personally... but in all reality, this email is being sent to hundreds of people, personalized with their names in it as well. I'm sure you knew that, but then again you may not have. That being said, I have a confession to make... I'm nothing special. I'm not an answer to prayers... I'm not a savior, a Jesus Christ, a Donald J. Trump, or the Easter bunny. I'm just an imperfect, rough around the edges middle-class citizen that was asleep at the wheel **until... 2020 happened. When I made the decision to run for Congress, it was because it was something I believed God was calling me to do, and if I'm being honest... it scared me to death. Why? Because I'm not a politician nor did I know the first thing about campaigning. None the less, I took time to pray about it and ask God for confirmation. But something else I did was take the time to count the cost of what I was about to do. I believe too many people jump into things without truly counting the costs of how the decision they're about to make may impact their families, their friends, their communities, and their personal lives. That being said, I was obedient to what I believe God was calling me to and took a leap of faith... and both by the grace of God and support from people like you, Peter, during the 2022 Texas Primaries against Dan Crenshaw we were successful in taking 17% of his votes with only two things: $45k raised 3 months to campaign Not bad against a highly popular incumbent like Dan Crenshaw who raised roughly $9M between January 2021 and February 2022. But I'm not responsible for that... both the grace of God and the support of patriots like you are responsible for that. And it's been humbling to know there are so many people who'd like me to run again in 2024. So am I going to run for Congressional District 2 again so that we can take all of this momentum we've built and finally unseat Dan Crenshaw? Here's the deal... I'd really like to. That's the goal, anyway. But here's the problem... (and this is why he won the 2022 Texas Primary race) Let's pretend for a moment that Dan Crenshaw and I are competing businesses that have to get the word out about the products/services that we offer. Dan Crenshaw started his business back in 2017 and I didn't start mine until 2021, which means he's been in business 4 years longer than I have. He's had time to really establish a brand, a business, a great marketing strategy, a customer base, and even gain a ton of investor funding. But since I didn't start my business until four years later, if I want to compete against Crenshaw, I've got to work even harder if I want to take enough marketshare to be a real threat to his enterprise. Oh, and I forgot to mention that when I started my business, I had to start it on the side because, like you, I still have to keep a roof over my head and put food on the table. The unfortunate reality is that no matter how bad his product or customer service is, it's difficult to beat him whenever he has the ability to outspend you 200 to 1. Yeah, you read that right. 200 to 1. Think about it... He's got the money and power to hire employees, PR people, a marketing team, and dispute the truth his competition is fighting to expose at a ratio of 200:1. That's the reality what we're facing here, Peter. And yet... our company (campaign) was still able to take 17% of his market share. So the question becomes... how do we take even more marketshare and put Crenshaw out of business once and for all? We're going to have to get creative. And in order to do that I need to be transparent with you... we're not going to accomplish it with $45k. I'm going to need to turn the " side business" (campaign) into a full-time business so that I no longer have to split my focus between my career and my campaign... IF we are truly going to be successful, that is. So there's two ways to do this... I can legally pay myself a salary from the campaign. I can earn enough in the private sector. The first option is not a path I want to have to take because unlike other candidates, I'm not in this to make money and get rich. Also, and this is just my opinion, campaign contributions would be better utilized for getting the word out to voters. After all, donors don't really GET anything for their contributions except the satisfaction in knowing that they donated financially to a candidate they believe in. The second option, in my humble opinion, is the way to go. Especially if it provides real value and serves people in a meaningful way. And so yesterday I made a monumental announcement about a new community I started on Locals called "Jameson On Tap," and I don't mind telling you that part of the reason I started this community is so that I can make sure I can stay focused on politics and not have to split my attention between my career and my campaign. But you want to know what my ultimate goal is, Peter? I would like to be able to donate my entire congressional salary to veterans, first responders, and the mental health crisis as a result of me earning enough in the private sector that I can afford to do so. (Save this email - hold me accountable). But that's not the only purpose Jameson On Tap serves... We all talk about how we need to wake people up, mobilize, equip ourselves, and take clear and concise action... And that's another reason I created this community. The intent isn't for this to be just another community on Locals - the intent is for YOUR voice to be heard, YOUR questions to get answered, and YOUR actions to mean something. Let's have the hard conversations that we're not allowed to have on Fakebook or any of the other big-tech platforms. Let's mobilize and build stronger relationships with other patriots so that we can unite, start taking action, and start taking our country back. Let's hear from and connect with other patriots, thought leaders, and elected officials so that we can finally start taking our country back, little by little. (As a matter of fact, my first guest interview will be with Chad Prather on Thursday, December 8 at 7:00pm CST) If I was wealthy, I'd be more than happy to donate my time to make this all happen... but I'm not wealthy. As a matter of fact, during the 2022 Primaries I lost a couple of clients and took a significant loss to my income. And you know what? I still haven't recovered completely. But you know what else? I still make the decision to show up and fight, every single day. Why? Because everything in our lives... movies, football games, the kids soccor games, vacations, wine-tasting, beer drinking, and $8 lattes... none of it matters if we lose our country. Our Founding Father's pledged to each other their lives, their fortunes, and their sacred honor for the cause of liberty... THAT is why I continue to show up every day and serve my community, my district, my state, and my country. But I can't do this alone nor can I do it all for free at the expense of my family being homeless and hungry. I all but went broke running for office so it should be clear that I'm not doing this to try and get rich... I'm doing this because I love my country and want to be able to put 100% of my focus on winning the fight to Restore Liberty and Preserve America... to unseat Dan Crenshaw. But I need your help, Peter. Which is why I'm inviting you to not only become a member of Jamson On Tap, but to become a paid supporter of Jameson On Tap at only $10 per month. That's one less trip to Whataburger each month. One less latte... One less bottle of wine... I'm not going to guilt you into it by asking you, "Can I count on you?" Instead, I'm just going to humbly ask you to tap in by clicking the button below and supporting our movement. Instead, I'm just going to humbly ask you to tap in to help me reach a place where I can donate my entire congressional salary to the causes that are important to people like you and me. If the button below doesn't work, click here instead: <> TAP IN TODAY <> For Liberty, GETTR <> Gab <> * Truth Social <> Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

**Welcome to the Miyares Roundup!**
---
**Attorney General Miyares was hard at work this week fighting for Virginians. ** _**_Sending Love & Prayers to Chesapeake_**_
---
| | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=bc1fbf6832ff438cb58462e5cd4a6858&_e=c_asCvgrZzRcAtxse6Ym3ER3T5ITBtyHMJnz6smF1U7IClJWPyPLXAjsUd5cP9yW8QFThxAZf9HsArffMvPWyCobN2FMJ4qF-XN5akIpDH8EkMGxLihXTUrC7yjMZi16z4Z23FL-D0kTICAVV7-Loi1_duuXLjU7z6rFOFkWFytNCsoy0yjqfHoQePztlNnbg6f7ix1BZnbv6C8tIIGMxg%3D%3D)

| | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=bc1fbf6832ff438cb58462e5cd4a6858&_e=c_asCvgrZzRcAtxse6Ym3ISaZVPBWdaIn1alJ3R_2EZlviWggLVWgbbVEOaIeA1oF_nTW9lH3LlS2zQKGpQyKNYkOJeZMIXjGhuCGSzkgWPB4FFFiO-0fafg3kAz5LmlwfQ3PZDrQknIod3MXrIAZp5rG46mdYb9zHgSnX7PNhTpjOkWwx9x9vDjzwI-0kEnM9LcYwFs2cJcLohBV_8MFcjsBH7SWqL2j55BPkEoZrw%3D)
---
**_Attorney General Miyares announced an important new public awareness initiative this week called “One Pill Can Kill.” This initiative aims to generate open, honest conversations amongst families about counterfeit drugs and fentanyl and the extreme threat these substances pose. “One Pill Can Kill” will initially run on radio and TV stations in every media market of Virginia for 60 days. _**
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=bc1fbf6832ff438cb58462e5cd4a6858&_e=c_asCvgrZzRcAtxse6Ym3ISaZVPBWdaIn1alJ3R_2EZlviWggLVWgbbVEOaIeA1oF_nTW9lH3LlS2zQKGpQyKB1bCfjlDMZNEh3aAt7W2E45RKTyYFLhu4yvebf5XCqcQx_zoLpq6JgYSKjjN45O1_FajwI1nmz1vmZVnQX03-dxlJdmn7xCXlVgNMVVne6ePqHpU2v5VYHLIW9oGhm6K5JSsCcWJsYK1gQbQ_Vio-w%3D "One Pill Can Kill")
_“The opioid epidemic has had a devastating effect on our Commonwealth. There isn’t a corner of our state that hasn’t been touched by its pain and destruction. Tragically, overdose deaths are now not limited to addiction, but to counterfeit pills laced with a highly potent, deadly substance - fentanyl. Unfortunately, we’ve seen too many young people overdose and die after experimenting with these powerful drugs. As a father, this new threat terrifies me. That’s why I launched ‘One Pill Can Kill,’ a public awareness initiative aimed at generating conversations around the dangers of counterfeit drugs and fentanyl.”_ **–Attorney General Jason Miyares**
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=bc1fbf6832ff438cb58462e5cd4a6858&_e=c_asCvgrZzRcAtxse6Ym3ISaZVPBWdaIn1alJ3R_2EZlviWggLVWgbbVEOaIeA1oF_nTW9lH3LlS2zQKGpQyKJrFqXkwEVU5Jcd7pwpUhJwJwvbEc_kE_7Q_pHAsIc9lEUyr7TGEaCX71CssklnLHu-zh4ZvNThG0KtrjsD1gyUBU5CD4_nLWijV36P-o5kbA7POratz5XM3Jmj5Vbcynzx1puwnsMl5FBKn2wT4p-A%3D)
---
**_First Lady Suzanne S. Youngkin joined Attorney General Miyares at the announcement in Norfolk, sharing both her support for the public awareness initiative and information about her “Women & Girls: Wellness” program. _** _“One pill can take a life. One pill can rob you of your dreams. One pill can deny your family of seeing you again, of ever having a normal holiday because you had your life taken too soon. Part of our job is to remind people that mistakes will not define your life, that your past shouldn’t define your future, and that the biggest sign of strength if you’re dealing with addiction is just admitting that you need help.” _ **– Attorney General Jason Miyares**
---
| | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=bc1fbf6832ff438cb58462e5cd4a6858&_e=c_asCvgrZzRcAtxse6Ym3ISaZVPBWdaIn1alJ3R_2EZlviWggLVWgbbVEOaIeA1oF_nTW9lH3LlS2zQKGpQyKLT0UB2xICco85vWXhStg8xuVaqQd928mBuEIjmNZTjfymTu-_mkGY5WlFTOiDc_O0Ddkh0iud4cC1SyAHkU572FsYhD7D8qBqLIeiMNxwYQMuiXezsU_yas3oWgQjVxE2O4XWUbgbY2P0S5v5jyikU%3D)
---
_**FAST FACTS ON THE CRISIS IN VIRGINIA**_
* Since 2013, drug overdoses have been the leading cause of unnatural death in Virginia.
* Opioids, specifically fentanyl, have driven these increases. **In 2021, fentanyl contributed to 76.4% of all Virginia overdose deaths.**
* **Fatal fentanyl overdoses increased 22.8% from 2020 to 2021.**
* In 2021,**98% of fatal fentanyl overdoses in Virginia** were **caused by the illicit** , rather than prescription, **version of the drug**.

---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=bc1fbf6832ff438cb58462e5cd4a6858&_e=c_asCvgrZzRcAtxse6Ym3ISaZVPBWdaIn1alJ3R_2EZlviWggLVWgbbVEOaIeA1oF_nTW9lH3LlS2zQKGpQyKFyMoZ2OBhIDD1pTczQSrKmS3sVjAWVFOdeYDbDYjyDdB0isfedUYMOPyDiP_0govuchMWQCHkJCKVDlLfwyHe8iC_qlCTiFO-g4hw7lao4FSegoocG6ynWJo0q_LBi6bo0B6D5R_mRnEI4pz6808co%3D)
---

| | **As a condition of the COVID-19 public health emergency, in March 2020 the DEA allowed audio-visual telemedicine services to prescribe buprenorphine, one of three FDA-approved medications for opioid use disorder treatment. ** **However, this condition is set to expire when the COVID-19 public health emergency ends. Without the proposed permanent extension, the current expiration of the public health emergency could cut off an estimated 2.5 million U.S. adults who utilize the opioid use disorder treatment.** **Interdiction efforts alone won’t end the crisis. Attorneys general nationwide are urging for this treatment to remain easily available for those in need. ** _“The need to ensure medical resources for Virginians battling opioid abuse has never been greater. Enabling creative, effective strategies, such as verified telemedicine, provides those suffering with potential treatment options which is especially important to those living in underserved areas.”_ **– Attorney General Miyares** **Learn more about the effort**[**HERE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=bc1fbf6832ff438cb58462e5cd4a6858&_e=c_asCvgrZzRcAtxse6Ym3FhEdUae8pBVghKK7OTr__G3kxsEHRv9uL6Izx5uMXHf0ao9lsNoT89-dGTQkmAvM0DCvpKd47j7PbHgG4LMBqp-8VQKu4TDgJIVMwYu5HwAtBB_Bfnmbo85iByLs7gP-tQPBXzKsvxfVWOxFcGi51LdyLUXH_s3H_0uxKWHtqDnKSiUVNhYo76AZZGEDNd0OHM-GiYNn4LcgFncQ1Um4q7DQ1zp2SYxTgZ0d4SxaafBkld6o30W4DXC6Hep9xMteSVKvOzUskT5MngxnO4SMJRCyTeMb4LsC4JeZPftxUZPTltqYvNqUciWM7T1LpEcfUW_RerpfDfC8PJX3mXFyTStUd-BSWuujF2_IQ8ysoD3-rT0pcqoLS4smf3U77Bra9h_PpOYMLW58hGcPejAdsbb0prXoRnSfufqUMUQwnWbR4g3dT91fihxpTUYgh02cQ%3D%3D)**.**

| | **Highlighted topics discussed include how the CCP is helping fuel the fentanyl crisis across the nation, corruption, TikTok, and long-standing human rights abuses and tactics of extreme oppression. ** _“My mother fled her home country of Cuba with nothing. She was literally penniless and homeless. But when you live in a society where the government controls every aspect of your life — that kind of tyranny takes away your ingenuity, initiative and the ability to live your life.” _ _“When you grow up hearing stories [of violence against your family] like that [in Cuba], it reminds me of a great quote by [author] C.S. Lewis: ‘Of all the tyrannies, the worst tyrannies are done for ‘your own good.’ That’s the great siren of communism — they claim that they are doing it in the name of equality, but the reality is that it is oppression.”_ **– Attorney General Jason Miyares**

clean_body: | | | Welcome to the Miyares Roundup! Attorney General Miyares was hard at work this week fighting for Virginians. Sending Love & Prayers to Chesapeake | | | | | Attorney General Miyares announced an important new public awareness initiative this week called “One Pill Can Kill.” This initiative aims to generate open, honest conversations amongst families about counterfeit drugs and fentanyl and the extreme threat these substances pose. “One Pill Can Kill” will initially run on radio and TV stations in every media market of Virginia for 60 days. "One Pill Can Kill" “The opioid epidemic has had a devastating effect on our Commonwealth. There isn’t a corner of our state that hasn’t been touched by its pain and destruction. Tragically, overdose deaths are now not limited to addiction, but to counterfeit pills laced with a highly potent, deadly substance - fentanyl. Unfortunately, we’ve seen too many young people overdose and die after experimenting with these powerful drugs. As a father, this new threat terrifies me. That’s why I launched ‘One Pill Can Kill,’ a public awareness initiative aimed at generating conversations around the dangers of counterfeit drugs and fentanyl.” –Attorney General Jason Miyares First Lady Suzanne S. Youngkin joined Attorney General Miyares at the announcement in Norfolk, sharing both her support for the public awareness initiative and information about her “Women & Girls: Wellness” program. “One pill can take a life. One pill can rob you of your dreams. One pill can deny your family of seeing you again, of ever having a normal holiday because you had your life taken too soon. Part of our job is to remind people that mistakes will not define your life, that your past shouldn’t define your future, and that the biggest sign of strength if you’re dealing with addiction is just admitting that you need help.” – Attorney General Jason Miyares | | FAST FACTS ON THE CRISIS IN VIRGINIA Since 2013, drug overdoses have been the leading cause of unnatural death in Virginia. Opioids, specifically fentanyl, have driven these increases. In 2021, fentanyl contributed to 76.4% of all Virginia overdose deaths. Fatal fentanyl overdoses increased 22.8% from 2020 to 2021. In 2021,98% of fatal fentanyl overdoses in Virginia were caused by the illicit , rather than prescription, version of the drug. | | Following the press conference announcing One Pill Can Kill, Attorney General Miyares and First Lady Suzanne S. Fellow American,

subject: Cyber Monday’s BEST. DEAL. EVER. 6 More Years Of Selfless, Awe-Inspiring Leadership
body:
Early voting is underway
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85b319c6-6ec2-4b64-a788-66eae3b472b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | With **Cyber Monday** upon us, deals are flooding all of our inboxes. **[But the best deal for our country today--and every day--is investing in returning a man of honor, compassion and moral strength, Senator Raphael Warnock, to the U.S. Senate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7ef3e236-5366-4a45-9767-8e9016ace85f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_(...or you could see it as keeping a violent misogynist who'd ban all abortion, put a gun to his wife's head and threatened to "blow her brains out," and kisses Trump's a** like it's his job, Herschel Walker, far away from power over our lives. Whichever works for you!)_** **_Today, early voting starts all across Georgia for the Georgians in this community--so make a plan to vote today if you can!_** _**On December 6th, with everyone's help today, we can ****close this deal and give Democrats the 51st Senate seat so we need to get SO MUCH MORE DONE for our families and communities.**_ We're not telling you not to get that tv you've always wanted on Cyber Monday! (We have our own wish list.) Just to remind you to **[_take advantage of election day, Tuesday, December 6th--the best deal you'll ever be offered and one that will last six years_ _!_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea3277bd-299b-4cfd-81eb-91f711059d4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Cyber Monday’s BEST. DEAL. EVER. 6 More Years Of Selfless, Awe-Inspiring Leadership**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6bb9076d-50ce-43de-9d96-981d6fc5760f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [**Can you join the Blue Amp Action community in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to help deal Senator Warnock into the Senate, and deal a blow to the vapid, violent Herschel Walker's chances of ever going to Washington as anything more than a tourist?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T277a7bd6-65b3-439a-bba9-912e7c025848/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Wishing you a happy holiday season, with our thanks for being part of our community!
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61977774:JGBQTuGNH:m:1:3371812801:47F521E65471F70D1D7D37C281D1FBDE:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

subject: Warnock has done this before

body:
|

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61976025:6Q8K8uGWN:m:1:3331421248:02C64B9D47AF17E6E821F5A57FAB1D5B:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61976025:6Q8K8uGWN:m:1:3331421248:02C64B9D47AF17E6E821F5A57FAB1D5B:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61976025:6Q8K8uGWN:m:1:3331421248:02C64B9D47AF17E6E821F5A57FAB1D5B:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61976025:6Q8K8uGWN:m:1:3331421248:02C64B9D47AF17E6E821F5A57FAB1D5B:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61976025:6Q8K8uGWN:m:1:3331421248:02C64B9D47AF17E6E821F5A57FAB1D5B:r)

Herschel Walker
