# [Lethal robots in the hands of San Francisco police?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=87395790&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6ODczOTU3OTAsImlhdCI6MTY2OTY2NTg4OCwiZXhwIjoxNjcyMjU3ODg4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fhBdCC0Kv_RdhAY35de-u6QURp4X_CJGphTrVJoGSC8)
### What could possibly go wrong?
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/d8646107-c2a1-45ec-8733-735550615e7b?r=1hvr60)
---
| Nov 28| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d8646107-c2a1-45ec-8733-735550615e7b?r=1hvr60)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=87395790&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6ODczOTU3OTAsInJlYWN0aW9uIjoi4p2kIiwiaWF0IjoxNjY5NjY1ODg4LCJleHAiOjE2NzIyNTc4ODgsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0xMDE4NTk3Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.LCwtPxd5siy0MsdMulzr23aOTkhm_nZt-O2HiMIjwIk&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=87395790&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6ODczOTU3OTAsImlhdCI6MTY2OTY2NTg4OCwiZXhwIjoxNjcyMjU3ODg4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fhBdCC0Kv_RdhAY35de-u6QURp4X_CJGphTrVJoGSC8&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=87395790&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6ODczOTU3OTAsImlhdCI6MTY2OTY2NTg4OCwiZXhwIjoxNjcyMjU3ODg4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fhBdCC0Kv_RdhAY35de-u6QURp4X_CJGphTrVJoGSC8)
---
| | [Save](https://substack..l8NNvGKpyqEYkyKPIGRQJYvt6CSFN8P_Cnyo3wkIvPc?)
---
Tomorrow, the San Francisco Board of Supervisors will vote on [a proposal to arm local police robotic drones with lethal weapons](https://substack.com/redirect/e1eb4113-655e-4ee9-bab4-752160308d82?r=1hvr60). It is an authoritarian policy whose very suggestion reveals a disturbing political trend in our city that should shame every San Franciscan.
Does San Francisco still deserve its supposedly "progressive" reputation?
### **Two Steps Forward, Three Steps Back**
Proposing to arm SFPD drones with lethal force is positively ignorant, especially when contrasted with the progress emerging across the rest of California. At the state level, California [recently expanded](https://substack.com/redirect/cde066ee-c330-4690-aa6c-70bfb5d2242e?r=1hvr60) a policy to become among the first states in the nation to proactively seal criminal records after most defendants complete their sentences. Just last year, our state adopted [several measures](https://substack.com/redirect/6b39f0a5-d878-4f00-b445-c45ebc1b56c3?r=1hvr60) to curtail the use of force by human police officers.
Giving police robots lethal weapons would senselessly move in the opposite direction.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fa17969f-ebbb-405b-954d-2d6ce1cca16b?r=1hvr60)|
---|---|---
Photo credit: [Raymond Wambsgans](https://substack.com/redirect/ff4b458a-cc32-4dde-b603-13d0614b7f2f?r=1hvr60)
We've all seen how often police get it wrong. Every [innocent person killed by police](https://substack.com/redirect/7c78ed88-1eff-407d-bb5c-bd37c4f985e2?r=1hvr60) proves the point, as does every example of [state violence towards unarmed dissidents or journalists](https://substack.com/redirect/e14436b6-1f43-4bdf-b754-e848215dfa2f?r=1hvr60). Every time an [innocent person is executed](https://substack.com/redirect/2fc9a385-366b-4439-99a4-3f243d340784?r=1hvr60) by the state proves the point further, as does every [prisoner exonerated](https://substack.com/redirect/0ae87dc9-aa68-4585-9b36-fa8e9d324ff1?r=1hvr60) after conviction for [crimes they did not commit](https://substack.com/redirect/c1e99993-352d-4667-ad2f-a1544a220c8f?r=1hvr60), often after losing years of their lives to biased so-called "justice."
Especially in this context, arming robots--with even less discretion than human police officers--would be senseless, lazy, and predictably lead to innocent people ending up in early graves. [Too](https://substack.com/redirect/63244670-597c-439c-a69b-13e466df7ceb?r=1hvr60) many [innocent](https://substack.com/redirect/546e1bf7-bdcc-4162-9af0-fb23e6e8a6e1?r=1hvr60) San Franciscans have [already](https://substack.com/redirect/b9af1a88-9b79-49db-bd03-a20804e94370?r=1hvr60) been [killed](https://substack.com/redirect/7b140d27-2dd2-4549-91ad-402bca092650?r=1hvr60) by SFPD officers.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=87395790&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6ODczOTU3OTAsImlhdCI6MTY2OTY2NTg4OCwiZXhwIjoxNjcyMjU3ODg4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fhBdCC0Kv_RdhAY35de-u6QURp4X_CJGphTrVJoGSC8)
### **Convenient Claims Ignore Alternatives**
Police don't just kill some innocent people and send others to prison. Recent examples from [Uvalde](https://substack.com/redirect/76041985-9914-4b22-ae5d-d1f0acf11ee2?r=1hvr60), Texas to [Colorado Springs](https://substack.com/redirect/11410636-26ad-4399-a87c-77664cfa3c23?r=1hvr60), Colorado also reveal how little police actually do to protect public safety. Those particular events revealed police not only failing to take meaningful action in the face of a threat to public safety, but then counterproductively [impeding](https://substack.com/redirect/a19c5b31-98e7-47af-a2d6-ad856e9d575c?r=1hvr60) and even [detaining](https://substack.com/redirect/11410636-26ad-4399-a87c-77664cfa3c23?r=1hvr60) civilians who did the right thing.
On the one hand, police officers failing to intervene when innocent lives are threatened might seem like a reason to arm robots and deploy them instead. Policies to reduce risks to police officers in the face of potential violence are worth considering in the abstract, but applying that reasoning in any given instance requires ignoring that police are paid generous salaries--starting at [over $100,000](https://substack.com/redirect/0e9bbd97-27d8-4612-a6f5-8210813afc7f?r=1hvr60) in San Francisco--precisely because their jobs involve risk.
In fact, policing is [far less risky](https://substack.com/redirect/9aa718bc-e5ea-4b10-b64f-8effa7ab0618?r=1hvr60) than many other less-compensated lines of work, including construction, logging, delivery driving, mining, and agriculture. Government statistics also prove that policing has [grown safer](https://substack.com/redirect/eeb762cd-16a5-41be-8c92-fa72fb317818?r=1hvr60) in recent years. If anyone is going to consider arming robots to reduce risks to human police officers, they might consider starting instead with robots to reduce the more substantial risk to laborers--many of whom are from precisely the communities most exposed to arbitrary profiling by police.
Arming drones makes even less sense when considering the costs, particularly to justice, the presumption of innocence, and communities of color long subjected to arbitrary police violence and profiling. It would be one thing if police didn't already [kill over 1,000 people every year](https://substack.com/redirect/46dd0626-9cbf-4287-90f4-611138cecf80?r=1hvr60) and falsely arrest many more, reflecting [massive racial disparities and biases](https://substack.com/redirect/d8182f08-d373-43f7-818e-ef0d49b302e0?r=1hvr60). That stark reality, however, suggests that tomorrow's proposal offers policymakers a chance to leap from a frying pan into a proverbial fire.
### **Tech can enhance efficiency, but not public safety**
Facial recognition technology was presented to the public (by [a domestic-facing military industrial complex](https://substack.com/redirect/173a1c71-fa35-44ef-a8cf-e3acb86c14b6?r=1hvr60)) as a way to protect public safety. But the profound invasiveness of allowing the government to track everyone's movements in public space threatens the public more than it could protect us.
That's why the SF Board of Supervisors adopted [the first policy in the country](https://substack.com/redirect/aabf4146-6f62-43be-8db7-9c4ea79dd933?r=1hvr60) to prohibit the use of facial recognition technology by municipal agencies, including police, in 2019. The Supervisors adopted that policy for many good reasons, some of which I explained to the Board before their historic vote.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0843b100-7801-410f-874c-d1296ba3d6f5?r=1hvr60)
Proponents of tech-in-policing presume that public safety challenges are driven by inefficiency in enforcement, as distinct from more intrinsic problems like poverty, social crisis, and desperation. Proponents of tech-in-policing also ignore how technology effectively [launders documented racial biases](https://substack.com/redirect/0760b3bc-0da4-4bf2-859d-4b6155f8a172?r=1hvr60) while pioneering new ways to violate fundamental rights. The [unique threats posed by facial recognition](https://substack.com/redirect/8ff2a87b-857a-4628-a773-fbbc5104d20b?r=1hvr60) were among the reasons the Board voted to restrain it in 2019.
### **Political decisions are dynamic, not static**
I've [frequently](https://substack.com/redirect/26799f9b-1bc0-48b8-9182-2a8b64c8b38a?r=1hvr60) called out [journalists](https://substack.com/redirect/366a1fde-974c-486f-8d4a-d891f88e3777?r=1hvr60) for being oblivious rubes repeatedly duped by corporate and state leaders. The saga of the Board of Supervisors walking back its historic 2019 policy reflects this pattern.
Most journalists report on policy proposals and decisions as if they represented static positions, as opposed to dynamic vectors. That means that reporting on any given issue inevitably fuels future trends, especially when that reporting indulges or privileges the perspectives of agencies or corporations.
That's exactly what happened here. Why would elected leaders in a supposedly "progressive" city even consider a proposal so authoritarian as to subject residents to [arbitrary execution without charge or trial](https://substack.com/redirect/55b6d5b8-2c9f-4b09-aa57-aacf636b78c3?r=1hvr60)?
Every story about the supposed "crime wave" sweeping San Francisco has reflected [editorial decisions to privilege the perspectives of police and property owners](https://substack.com/redirect/89d413c7-ed1e-439f-a6a4-57246da6e3a2?r=1hvr60) before, for instance, San Franciscans subjected to arbitrary policing. This is not an abstract concern for the few Black residents who remain in our city after the vicious gentrification (in which police [played a key role](https://substack.com/redirect/dc778734-24bd-4392-8e24-f240f1dfbe71?r=1hvr60) beyond that of the housing market) of the past generation shrank our city's Black population to roughly [a third](https://substack.com/redirect/102f8eda-7c50-4eb6-9939-6d32a2df64e2?r=1hvr60) of its [previous peak](https://substack.com/redirect/b53815c2-b5f5-47d0-985a-acd41d859c5d?r=1hvr60).
The Board of Supervisors already voted earlier this year to [water down](https://substack.com/redirect/558bed29-f0a3-4711-ba00-560373deb572?r=1hvr60) their historic decision in 2019 that curtailed police surveillance and expanded civilian oversight, opening the door for more reforms favoring the SFPD over justice and our communities. As I [explained](https://substack.com/redirect/777c98f5-7258-4320-a012-b4ab23a29e81?r=1hvr60) at the time:
> Mayor Breed, a staunch ally of the San Francisco Police Department, previously proposed a ballot measure to overturn our 2019 ordinance entirely, before then [withdrawing](https://substack.com/redirect/16397de7-1999-4689-a333-f0b5e1812a72?r=1hvr60) it and then proposing a new compromise that merely waters down the Board of Supervisors' historic previous decision. In particular, the new policy passed by the Board of Supervisors gives police real-time access to surveillance footage owned by private individuals and businesses, subject to their consent and certain (relatively meager) limits.
> While the compromise is less damaging than the ballot measure would have been, it continues to undermine civilian oversight of police activities. This support for surveillance without civilian oversight--even at the local level in a supposedly "progressive" enclave despite recent political resistance--reinforces the corruption of a security industrial complex, and reveals the strength of its political tentacles.
Other events this year have pushed this trend towards more aggressive and less humane policing. The recall of former District Attorney Chesa Boudin earlier this year, the Mayor's ensuing appointment of [former SFPD propagandist](https://substack.com/redirect/c7730a9f-9b87-4901-9c8c-6ba98c43b832?r=1hvr60) Matt Dorsey to the District 6 seat on the Board, and Joel Engardio's victory recent over Gordon Mar in District 4 all politically emboldened the SFPD.
Proposals to expand their authority even further predictably aim to test the limits of their influence.
What next?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..gd0QTL45LQfngbnO6ibzM88qSTPlbibWzA8gdh65P_U?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=87395790)
### **Take action**
If you live in San Francisco, today is a great time to [call your Supervisor](https://substack.com/redirect/2b4b80c7-13cb-4ca1-be8d-f94fe12d6b51?r=1hvr60) to convey your concerns and any outrage you might be feeling. Feel free to explain that the SFPD proposal to allow drones to use lethal force:
1. is unapologetically authoritarian, and profoundly out of step with our city's commitments to civil liberties.
2. indulges concerns about police safety while denigrating pressing concerns about community safety.
3. resigns the Board's previous leadership on issues of public safety and civil liberties.
4. invites an escalation of tech-washing that has long papered over (or entirely obscured) documented racial biases in law enforcement.
5. compounds an already problematic history of our city marginalizing communities of color.
6. repeats the errors of a federal policy that has already exacerbated international conflict while enabling hundreds (if not thousands) of preventable civilian deaths.

### **Learn more**
Ten years ago, the Loyola Public Interest Law Reporter published my remarks from a symposium hosted by Loyola University Chicago School of Law. The focus of my comments were lethal drone strikes, which then Attorney General Eric Holder had just defended at another law school across town in the preceding days.
Everything I explained in that speech relating to the Pentagon and CIA--legal realism, the continuing erosion of constitutional rights, the unreliability of supposedly limiting principles, the executive branch gaming the courts, the abuse of the state secrets doctrine, and the self-marginalization of the judiciary--also applies here at the local level.
Paid subscribers can access a complete transcript of that speech with footnotes, as well as a video of my TEDx talk at the Harker School in 2017 exploring "American Authoritarianism and Restoring Constitutional Order." In it, I explain some of the forgotten history underlying contemporary debates over policing, public safety, and constitutional rights...

Tomorrow, the San Francisco Board of Supervisors will vote on . It is an authoritarian policy whose very suggestion reveals a disturbing political trend in our city that should shame every San Franciscan. Does San Francisco still deserve its supposedly "progressive" reputation? Two Steps Forward, Three Steps Back Proposing to arm SFPD drones with lethal force is positively ignorant, especially when contrasted with the progress emerging across the rest of California. At the state level, California a policy to become among the first states in the nation to proactively seal criminal records after most defendants complete their sentences. Just last year, our state adopted to curtail the use of force by human police officers. Giving police robots lethal weapons would senselessly move in the opposite direction. | | ---|---|--- Photo credit: We've all seen how often police get it wrong. Every proves the point, as does every example of . Every time an by the state proves the point further, as does every after conviction for , often after losing years of their lives to biased so-called "justice." Especially in this context, arming robots--with even less discretion than human police officers--would be senseless, lazy, and predictably lead to innocent people ending up in early graves. many San Franciscans have been by SFPD officers. Convenient Claims Ignore Alternatives Police don't just kill some innocent people and send others to prison. Recent examples from , Texas to , Colorado also reveal how little police actually do to protect public safety. Those particular events revealed police not only failing to take meaningful action in the face of a threat to public safety, but then counterproductively and even civilians who did the right thing. On the one hand, police officers failing to intervene when innocent lives are threatened might seem like a reason to arm robots and deploy them instead. Policies to reduce risks to police officers in the face of potential violence are worth considering in the abstract, but applying that reasoning in any given instance requires ignoring that police are paid generous salaries--starting at in San Francisco--precisely because their jobs involve risk. In fact, policing is than many other less-compensated lines of work, including construction, logging, delivery driving, mining, and agriculture. Government statistics also prove that policing has in recent years. If anyone is going to consider arming robots to reduce risks to human police officers, they might consider starting instead with robots to reduce the more substantial risk to laborers--many of whom are from precisely the communities most exposed to arbitrary profiling by police. Arming drones makes even less sense when considering the costs, particularly to justice, the presumption of innocence, and communities of color long subjected to arbitrary police violence and profiling. It would be one thing if police didn't already and falsely arrest many more, reflecting . That stark reality, however, suggests that tomorrow's proposal offers policymakers a chance to leap from a frying pan into a proverbial fire. Tech can enhance efficiency, but not public safety Facial recognition technology was presented to the public (by ) as a way to protect public safety. But the profound invasiveness of allowing the government to track everyone's movements in public space threatens the public more than it could protect us. That's why the SF Board of Supervisors adopted to prohibit the use of facial recognition technology by municipal agencies, including police, in 2019. Proponents of tech-in-policing also ignore how technology effectively while pioneering new ways to violate fundamental rights. The were among the reasons the Board voted to restrain it in 2019. The saga of the Board of Supervisors walking back its historic 2019 policy reflects this pattern. body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974884:J1uc1uGNu:m:1:3373497171:EA3628FCA191ADA4A4BB169184741AB2:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974884:J1uc1uGNu:m:1:3373497171:EA3628FCA191ADA4A4BB169184741AB2:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974884:J1uc1uGNu:m:1:3373497171:EA3628FCA191ADA4A4BB169184741AB2:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

Peter, The runoff in Georgia between Senator Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker is officially underway. A Warnock victory is critical for the people of Georgia, who deserve to be represented by someone who can do the job with dignity and competency, as Reverend Warnock has done for the last two years. Frankly, Herschel Walker is one of the least qualified, most dangerous candidates to run for U.S. Senate in recent years, if not ever. Holding the Georgia seat is also a BIG DEAL for Democrats – it will be the 51st seat in their majority after the Senate has been tied for the past two years. The 51st seat unlocks several important powers that the tied Senate prevented Democrats from exercising:
* Speed up the passage of Democratic legislation and nominations
* Give Democrats outright majorities instead of 50-50 splits on each committee
* Give Democrats full subpoena power
* Vastly reduce the influence of individual obstructionists Sinema and Manchin (now, they’ll only be able to block something if they both agree, which is not often the case)

All this and more is at stake in the Georgia runoff so we have to make sure Senator Warnock wins. **[Split a contribution between our PAC and his campaign now >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqcJuDX2HRji8zceUQ74uMn2nJh6LG5wYFs9-TDXcW4egbM7W8fdTXt6vaiTirmbfmhVmAgJhMiH9kTca1GkgVvxucm4liDXaa8BPwLGENlH6b5uI-5TscJgPLjmt6MSv3XK5uTjgDIceE3Z0A7eXcHUoe1cUtbh8Y1mi0u7caSs4qMQCGTHSJbVcOwLAW5tm7t5xSf_mSRxbD1LCh3YyNvVTJrZQdf-Gb4Nf1r8nPoY3dSbuhKqGB_j3Dv2EBGbfY_6ew_WeuIA0EPg7dvplvFiwCKZLZ09P2K9SiYSro4X20V9fei4AHqTAJzYueeI0ZGFryzC-glmO8UhuId9Ae5vHWxK5iZg0HZ7okjoc8BILrWafeIutrnqL_xwQNDNw/3rj/4xVRniU6QBGPOxPEyqq-wQ/h1/dkgpDiIRZqoMkKBEB5TYgMLp-0p-BpoiIIlRBauXaQU) ** According to recent reporting from NBC, Georgia’s voter turnout remained essentially unchanged from four years ago while other battleground states including Arizona and Pennsylvania experienced positive growth. clean_body: | | | Peter, The runoff in Georgia between Senator Raphael Warnock and Herschel Walker is officially underway. A Warnock victory is critical for the people of Georgia, who deserve to be represented by someone who can do the job with dignity and competency, as Reverend Warnock has done for the last two years. Frankly, Herschel Walker is one of the least qualified, most dangerous candidates to run for U.S. Senate in recent years, if not ever. Holding the Georgia seat is also a BIG DEAL for Democrats – it will be the 51st seat in their majority after the Senate has been tied for the past two years. The 51st seat unlocks several important powers that the tied Senate prevented Democrats from exercising: Speed up the passage of Democratic legislation and nominations Give Democrats outright majorities instead of 50-50 splits on each committee Give Democrats full subpoena power Vastly reduce the influence of individual obstructionists Sinema and Manchin (now, they’ll only be able to block something if they both agree, which is not often the case) All this and more is at stake in the Georgia runoff so we have to make sure Senator Warnock wins. According to recent reporting from NBC, Georgia’s voter turnout remained essentially unchanged from four years ago while other battleground states including Arizona and Pennsylvania experienced positive growth. If we’re going to win a true Senate majority, we have to do everything we can to help turn out Democratic voters in Georgia’s runoff. Thanks for your crucial support, -Team Save the Senate | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. **I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zajc6r1tqmn72poiudj99evbgvrsn5da5rqfr6ag_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8p74c3h2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z70p0bb8onj15d96gc3ne78c9es42s0mtn9k6r9g_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8p74c3h2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfh6ftk3n1jg3vkeuukil36c9n3jotknkttkt1r8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8p74c3h2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7g1ssf7866n7vid0bidtduus88lc81hjmgfas3g_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8p74c3h2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z97jour99lfdc8o8hu4o4tfm9r77n0e7gdqtuchg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8p74c3h2bs)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znjuvk4i1p424rhlmh6oe5tqoca9rq71ci5n1hbo_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8p74c3h2bs)** [**DONATE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0kua4nfq2cnva8l5s874votlop5s54u2gj9d8ig_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8p74c3h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6f6lli61aumqsngdca0rl1h0im3ujko90ikv178_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8p74c3h2bs) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z25htu14sa2mv0prctmuinhbbgnk03lfimami2tg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8p74c3h2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoqth4faornh8ih04jv3j6vrg8578h00vsp03598_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8p74c3h2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---

name: Bryce Berry, Young Democrats of Georgia
subject: Can you help Young Dems of Georgia?
body:
Senator Warnock needs your help! | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yzdgcMF-5SLW7iFLONVcUbjaLYygFfN_J_V0hDJ4r4mk-rK67GUy_ZY-psiZJbiAHt7BMzZ8hTWORyp8qFPb03ZgZR56Af7Hh_JICEtSzC7vIc21rYhWWzYr9Td5L7Ti5_Gti9ExAyq2AqLyUPCTkVTjFGjfoUV9DdbDIy9BtEj2lDLf40UBzyqBfvgjdg4QhzDIKsXAs7MWc4_Xy9d5MjTr2P60_AY4nFZQi7X4KC7X2354CekQp337cp1rzAnHn9yrOGQ6EKarUkuXIXI-hKX4LhgATPTE_Q0u2C0TG1HB4pAnJNDzxzcuKKhcy2PckQD1d07cGCGgFF10DBl1-pteDjdNlQ9GH8TO5fWKzesA/3rj/lESFiPWCSdGzohJQVHf8IA/h0/wykEQHZcwjE8ettTsXX1OeryezH7BH7tMsr6Y42-e4s)
---
Hi Derek! My name is Bryce Berry and I have the honor of serving as President of Young Democrats of Georgia! We have been hard at work organizing weekly canvasses, phone banks and town halls to ensure that young voters are ready and prepared to vote in this December 6th runoff election. Why? Because we know that Herschel Walker is not prepared, he is not fit and he is not ready to serve young Georgians in the United States Senate. Whether it be his election denialism, climate denialism or his extremism on a woman’s right to have an abortion, he has proven he is not who we need in the Senate. Young Georgians NEED Reverend Warnock. But unfortunately this race is going to be close, our organizers are working day in and day out to bring victory to this state but we rely on supporters like you. [Can we count on your support in this final stretch to help fund on the ground youth organizers and deliver victory for Senator Raphael Warnock? Your support will be crucial in delivering necessary resources to get out the youth vote on every single Georgia college and university campus and in every single one of our 159 counties.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yzdgcMF-5SLW7iFLONVcUbjaLYygFfN_J_V0hDJ4r4mtkZKvj4AqOgckFOZ5lk74N8IDg6QlBgaCYJOysMdi2je2Cw0R6hiwdofE3NahRPX_8gNF2FX3d-KMs1In5C47IRJ2bUmMsAsTsoLNE_yvTE4rdgpw6k5KFyzm863FH6fjhBpEDE0wFONzUIyw5Gdv63PTGY1a8KnUgcKBzURj6W2R3bcrCL6SJKZlybHjjCle_8sN_UJnD5hKcGM0sSegKn5JrqZ6ZOr--OcIgEuBDl7LF4QPOH44-bPF3JuIphslVHzj84-HYQ9QiW0p1r6ohLQ18fCfLKFpVWfML9INT9pQiTzm_lEuuCY_BETQOlNA/3rj/lESFiPWCSdGzohJQVHf8IA/h1/I3CcQYysxO_SZTpdPwzh9ERmNkaPoy2aCbJUmBLVEgQ) There are so many big things in store not just for Georgia but for Democracy. The eyes of the nation are yet again on Georgia and here our motto is YOUNG GETS IT DONE! With your support we will win.
---

clean_body: Senator Warnock needs your help! | | Hi Derek! My name is Bryce Berry and I have the honor of serving as President of Young Democrats of Georgia! We have been hard at work organizing weekly canvasses, phone banks and town halls to ensure that young voters are ready and prepared to vote in this December 6th runoff election. Why? Because we know that Herschel Walker is not prepared, he is not fit and he is not ready to serve young Georgians in the United States Senate. Whether it be his election denialism, climate denialism or his extremism on a woman’s right to have an abortion, he has proven he is not who we need in the Senate. Young Georgians NEED Reverend Warnock. But unfortunately this race is going to be close, our organizers are working day in and day out to bring victory to this state but we rely on supporters like you. There are so many big things in store not just for Georgia but for Democracy. The eyes of the nation are yet again on Georgia and here our motto is YOUNG GETS IT DONE! With your support we will win. Democratically Yours, Bryce Berry President, Young Democrats of Georgia | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: U.S. Marine illegally arrested by FBI gets 8 months in prison
body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington,
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4q6tqu70ucu8q0jsm2qem9kcutb2gkqgramtmo8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4cjh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpuktsvnv4q7mdd4k0tgve15ilap6fc1tagr13m0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4cjh2bs) Hi Patriot,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0idvm6cdnpjqtdstseqcekivrts5onvg16r3tcg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4cjh2bs)**

(Because you’re a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you’ve seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn’t protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn’t attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I’ve locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.

And now she’s throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Patriot, I’ve filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera – and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I’m suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus’ home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5qb9e66tm3g7skb8kl4imnbgok0e7rum8ga4chg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4cjh2bs)
I’m using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

[**Please give what you can right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf9e63gcigmleicul2qfe4kqohmtlj5v89a88oj0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4cjh2bs)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just[clicking on this link](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ifolnmnbgpktm41v461l9r1d762q5jhkv3b6k0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4cjh2bs) and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

[**Then think of U.S. Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera and each of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters I’m fighting for...and dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqt610rgdcgdvsnjqp3nt58pfkgppf4n363a6q5o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4cjh2bs)

body:
| Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State — and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1393%2E5257348%2EQdOj16)

Hi Derek, Rev. Warnock here — I’m feeling good, and I hope you are, too.
Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign — and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election.
Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State — and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.
**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal — and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.
**In a race this _neck and neck_ , every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. [So please, Derek, I’m personally asking: Will you rush $10 or more now — split between me and Adam Schiff — to keep Georgia blue?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2022_abs_em_warnock.8S9T3W&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20221128_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1393%2E5257348%2EQdOj16)**

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7872e0d2874b4b98ac8e9f5b7fac4d88&_e=nm7G1q_Wv4YJf4qvgmAqkPEibuQCghEiiqIP9Eb0HOGbMxi3rx-El-saIfrCEubFgDEOhDvvq2R65XBnBKQQwRiFAcny-Q4bQMSONi4C3RqNzROLSZZADhi1CdqkXsnw--A3UHJ8aZiBHFuQNTk1uKFRLImpIziIKXBwmvTlVSghJkvP_8XY9tR86u0tRpQLpDZIj-loAUQE_e7bjLJ7v02GVv-Kt6s22Zi1vpiLlLkHAwgLbXn8lHduCaBWa_Xr8W8GEIDlnpMTfbnuzVdjke33YuJsg4W4Qmt9Cj--EeX9Rf5UEj_4pKdW6flbQp1NC9JX_QC4nIbsh46mbPtAsBpSVxXOjQzy0u_dhVxouC8sTxubV6NZry49bzoMaHn07aQewfIsQNybp8MexBneh4U5YRU2j0CjhIydAi6jKhE%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7872e0d2874b4b98ac8e9f5b7fac4d88&_e=nm7G1q_Wv4YJf4qvgmAqkPEibuQCghEiiqIP9Eb0HOGbMxi3rx-El-saIfrCEubFgDEOhDvvq2R65XBnBKQQwRiFAcny-Q4bQMSONi4C3RqNzROLSZZADhi1CdqkXsnw--A3UHJ8aZiBHFuQNTk1uKFRLImpIziIKXBwmvTlVSghJkvP_8XY9tR86u0tRpQLpDZIj-loAUQE_e7bjLJ7v02GVv-Kt6s22Zi1vpiLlLkHAwgLbXn8lHduCaBWa_Xr9HRvE5O8ymgGafpEUoj5pVW1_ZpbejSt1uRnzucGtlsFov4CxKnip7nW2prQmxj2w1YyZEdWEywvwWag8j2sTrcccK8YnJL1hs-5GzUPQfL5O9kPQdumvM7srrEGhYJmT0gs1dYTydaRgbi6as0zj_erz81kQFhMv5YG2OxBitc%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7872e0d2874b4b98ac8e9f5b7fac4d88&_e=nm7G1q_Wv4YJf4qvgmAqkPEibuQCghEiiqIP9Eb0HOGbMxi3rx-El-saIfrCEubFgDEOhDvvq2R65XBnBKQQwRiFAcny-Q4bQMSONi4C3RqNzROLSZZADhi1CdqkXsnw--A3UHJ8aZiBHFuQNTk1uKFRLImpIziIKXBwmvTlVSghJkvP_8XY9tR86u0tRpQLpDZIj-loAUQE_e7bjLJ7v02GVv-Kt6s22Zi1vpiLlLkHAwgLbXn8lHduCaBWa_XrUdjjeYxJVZNzGI3F-2yo_AJ3PQoUqT7G2xNx8_YxosB7HWON_oDVcMXgeCnwFM_Pc8eqZcWqI5ciC08t3RKYgUGlUa-6rO5kqMqJ7W2FVXgv79lPOVDpRhPFMGqxGMnUh9PgirpAArBd784aEh1maxalw6BQ4gaS-B3qiSZGA4o%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: Look at the damage Biden caused 😮
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974844:6NgFmuGhN:m:1:3374012347:32F9A9F8F7E4ED1F142C97F2CF9ED85A:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974844:6NgFmuGhN:m:1:3374012347:32F9A9F8F7E4ED1F142C97F2CF9ED85A:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974844:6NgFmuGhN:m:1:3374012347:32F9A9F8F7E4ED1F142C97F2CF9ED85A:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974845:6NgFmuGhN:m:1:3374012347:32F9A9F8F7E4ED1F142C97F2CF9ED85A:r)

name: Special Election Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Next up: Virginia
body:
After state Democrats’ historic wins in the midterm elections, it’s essential that we keep building on this powerful momentum. | | |
---
| | We just learned we are going to have an ultra-competitive special election on January 10th, 2023 because of the midterm's results: Virginia Democrats will have a chance to replace an anti-abortion Republican with a strong Democratic leader who will fight to secure a better future for their state in Virginia’s state legislature – **_and this election will be ultra-competitive._** **After state Democrats’ historic wins in the midterm elections, it’s essential that we continue this powerful momentum – and that could start with flipping this seat from red to blue.** The Virginia Senate is in play next year and special elections like this are vital opportunities to set state Democrats on a path to success. **Special elections can come down to just one or two votes – that’s why we’re pulling out _all_ the stops to ensure state Democrats are well-equipped to win this seat. This is EXACTLY the type of race that Democrats need to lay the foundation for Democratic power-building in 2023.** [Rush $7, $25 or whatever you can afford today to help state Democrats win critical special elections in states like Virginia and across the country >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wAg9gBPS4rAJB5A4gY_FK-AYic2eIvl6chyi6ybjW5VGJ31KdpzbtPwIsqJrT1xsCBqS32ZGqNdN4Y5vZdArtmth37t4XZekNCtXThBPjxJar_fnh6qDNJPILKJ6mpFgfCnw-bfnt9Q0rqKNIaDvqL5jKVOTAOhrlozLNTlAv5hUnLgXpiptTLoaTgUVeUKm_86lYCi9t8lOxPBB1frXbEEUWbrt8jVM02krA52jR5PTYplY9x6p3G2YsJZOyaLmUGuIMo8fCshzNXr4_9R0mgQKl-1htAbP1eSCj16JDWxF6rQtaPQ8ON-h00tq5Si7TybAG_MDas8d2UpCCmGws0EuMaQgrPr30NVP6LW9i36zAYsKXyFaJgnryW-8GJB7I/3rj/VcA1AK2VRFOsctJrxWh-ww/h0/4TWaD_IimQv_wF80ZdAeUF3OF2tNN5SXmVzbCc__RDY) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: After state Democrats’ historic wins in the midterm elections, it’s essential that we keep building on this powerful momentum. | | | | | We just learned we are going to have an ultra-competitive special election on January 10th, 2023 because of the midterm's results: Virginia Democrats will have a chance to replace an anti-abortion Republican with a strong Democratic leader who will fight to secure a better future for their state in Virginia’s state legislature – and this election will be ultra-competitive. After state Democrats’ historic wins in the midterm elections, it’s essential that we continue this powerful momentum – and that could start with flipping this seat from red to blue. The Virginia Senate is in play next year and special elections like this are vital opportunities to set state Democrats on a path to success. Special elections can come down to just one or two votes – that’s why we’re pulling out all the stops to ensure state Democrats are well-equipped to win this seat. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: U.S. Marine illegally arrested by FBI gets 8 months in prison
body:
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington,
On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpv59lmifbubbsecv7teg59qseba2pa2p58mq78o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4c5h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2dh8pd5661ktvcu2um3c539ecaqa99qdqocq6i0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4c5h2bs) Hi Patriot,

**[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zl99ijgvsl27tfuoeoioip4vkbg63270i4qt83o0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4c5h2bs)**

(Because you’re a valued supporter of Freedom Watch, I had to rush you this urgent update about my client, Jesus Rivera. Please bear with me if you’ve seen some of this information before...it will be shocking to new supporters.)

On January 6, 2021, Jesus Rivera, a Marine combat veteran, peacefully recorded the events at the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. He shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida.

He didn’t protest (when I first heard his story, I thought he did).

Jesus didn’t attack police or use harsh language. He only shot video to provide for his wife and kids and entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

**But around 7:30 AM on January 20, 2021, between 12 to 20 heavily armed FBI agents raided his home with guns drawn. There was no probable cause, and the search warrant was obtained through lies and even outright fraud.
**
Jesus was forcefully handcuffed, then moved to the FBI building.

His wife asked for the warrant several times but didn’t receive it until after the FBI agents finished searching their home.

Jesus survived rocket attacks and exploding roadside bombs trying to bring freedom to Iraq and Afghanistan. But his freedom gets trampled on right here at home by Biden’s Gestapo DOJ and its FBI!

**What’s more, Jesus recently appeared before District Judge Colleen Kollar-Kotelly in Washington, D.C. and was unjustly sentenced to 8 months in federal prison.
**
Let me tell you, I’ve locked horns several times with Judge Kollar-Kotelly.

She’s a hardcore leftist whose nomination was opposed by every conservative group in the country. She’s the absolute worst judge I’ve appeared before in 45 years.

And now she’s throwing a true patriot and innocent man to the wolves.

**Patriot, I’ve filed a critically important class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera – and on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who is getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
I’m suing everyone responsible for this outrage: the lead agents, each agent who searched Jesus’ home, even FBI Director Christopher Wray.

The shocking, un-American conduct as alleged in my lawsuit can’t be allowed to go on.

**If the FBI can push around a peaceful, church-going Marine veteran for simply recording the events at the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.
**
That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znm9gbsi3um8k6svaq8qr6ic3865q7vtda9vhrcg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4c5h2bs)
I’m using two powerful class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

[**Please give what you can right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeasui15vrn7e3mb10at4j649t5sfqjpfn9oslc8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4c5h2bs)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, you can read more about my urgent class action lawsuit on behalf of Jesus Rivera and all January 6 peaceful protesters by just[clicking on this link](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcp0hg17obeq510mls45kl6q5lr93que7vbcjisg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4c5h2bs) and selecting the view button. After, simply scroll down to read the legal document.

[**Then think of U.S. Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera and each of the January 6 Peaceful Protesters I’m fighting for...and dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4hrj86m5ako5ophdk01qagojveb9lfh75vd58po_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4c5h2bs)

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrfgri1ojiskn25imks43do45jg77dj30gr9k998_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdhmeob4c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we wanted
to reach out to you before Giving Tuesday officially kicks off tomorrow.

As a fully grassroots organization, going up against the entire political
establishment, we’re counting on an influx of donations tomorrow to help
us reach our November fundraising goal.

With your support, we’ve overcome a lot. Despite millions of dollars spent
by right-wing super PACs against us and our candidates — we helped every
single member of the squad win re-election and we expanded our bloc by
powering Summer Lee and Greg Casar to victory.

Money has always been our biggest obstacle. We can’t rely on billionaire
donors or corporate PACs to pick up the slack when fundraising is down, we
rely on thousands of grassroots contributions to recruit candidates and
help them win.

We’re setting a goal to raise $30,000 before midnight tomorrow for Giving
Tuesday and it’s going to take every single JD supporter chipping in what
they can for us to get there.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121979?refcode=em20221128-26295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26295%2E1203867%2EANI5rx ]Peter, we’re
counting on you to contribute $3 before midnight tomorrow.
Will you rush your gift right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121979?refcode=em20221128-26295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26295%2E1203867%2EANI5rx ]Contribute $3

We operate on a pretty tight budget, especially compared to other
political organizations. Our average donation this year is just $18.23.
We’re proud of that but it also means we need a lot of small-dollar
donations to fuel our primaries.

We promise to use your donation in the best, most effective way possible.
And we will fight tooth and nail to elect more progressive champions like
AOC to Congress who will work for the people. Because we don’t just need
Democrats in Congress, we need better Democrats — Democrats who reject
corporate PAC contributions and actually work for their communities.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121979?refcode=em20221128-26295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26295%2E1203867%2EANI5rx ]Please, help support our work to move the Democratic Party to the left
by making a $3 donation before midnight tomorrow.

Thank you so much,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=26295%2E1203867%2EANI5rx ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=26295%2E1203867%2EANI5rx ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. subject: BREAKING NEWS: Embattled IL GOP Chair Don Tracy Becomes Distraction as Names Surface to Replace Him
body:
Sources confirm to Illinois Review that state central committee members are secretly floating the names of potential successors to embattled GOP Chair

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/07fdacf48998/breaking-newsembattled-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-becomes-distraction-as-names-surface-to-replace-him?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=593879795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_28_09_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-593879795d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Embattled IL GOP Chair Don Tracy Becomes Distraction as Names Surface to Replace Him (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/embattled-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-becomes-distraction-as-names-surface-to-replace-him.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=593879795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_28_09_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-593879795d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

While IL GOP chairman Don Tracy is under fire from grassroots conservatives, sources confirm to Illinois Review that state central committee members are secretly floating the names of potential successors.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/embattled-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-becomes-distraction-as-names-surface-to-replace-him.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=593879795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_28_09_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-593879795d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

It’s not uncommon for an IL GOP chairman to resign during the middle of their term. In ** 2020 (https://www.sj-r.com/story/news/politics/2020/12/07/illinois-gop-party-chairman-quits/43261735/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=593879795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_28_09_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-593879795d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, then chairman Tim Schneider announced during the state central committee’s December meeting that he would be resigning and appointing a special committee to choose his successor.

Republican voters are still reeling from massive losses during the November election in Illinois that saw the GOP losing every statewide race; losing winnable congressional races; and handing Democrats once again a supermajority in both the Illinois House and Senate chambers – leaving Republicans voiceless and irrelevant in state matters.

And despite publishing a weekly “Chairman’s Memo,” and serving as the leader of the IL Republican party, Tracy has yet to take any responsibility for the losses.

Several names have surfaced in the last week as potential candidates to replace Tracy, including state central committee member for the 8th District, Dean White; state central committee member for the 15th District, State Sen. Jason Plummer, 54th District; Will County grassroots activist, businesswoman and founder of the 10,000-plus member Illinois Patriots group Christina Clausen; former US Senate candidate Peggy Hubbard; and businessman and former candidate for governor Gary Rabine.

Sources have also confirmed to Illinois Review the idea of co-chairmen – a chairman representing the southern part of Illinois and another chairman representing the northern part of the state. With Illinois being such a large and diverse state – having co-chairs is an interesting idea and one that could help unify the various factions within the IL GOP.

In
** 2018 (https://illinois.gop/ilgop-leadership-announcement/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=593879795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_28_09_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-593879795d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, IL GOP chairman Tim Schneider named Lake County GOP chair Mark Shaw to serve as his co-chair. Schneider also named Shaw president of the Illinois Republican County Chairmen’s Association.

In announcing the appointment of a co-chairman, Schneider said,

“Chairman Mark Shaw is a great asset to the Illinois Republican Party, and I’m very pleased to announce a new joint effort with him to refocus our party’s efforts on grassroots and county-level organizing. This year’s [2018] election might be the most consequential one in our state’s history, so we must be more organized than ever before.”

The next state central committee meeting is scheduled for December 10th at the Bolingbrook Golf Club in Bolingbrook.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=593879795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_28_09_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-593879795d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=593879795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_28_09_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-593879795d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=593879795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_28_09_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-593879795d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=593879795d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_11_28_09_17&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-593879795d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

We cannot risk losing ground at this pivotal moment, particularly as Trump and his extremist cronies reemerge from Mar-a-Lago with an agenda of hate. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = We know from experience the national Republican machine and congressional Republicans will try and milk their razor-thin majority to the maximum. They’ll pander to special interests and ultra-wealthy donors. And Donald Trump is trying to fund his new presidential run with millions of dollars by barraging his contributors with hundreds of demented messages. = Thanks for all you are doing. — Eric | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. | | = Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. Send me back to the Senate.** My campaign has just eight days before the runoff election, and we need resources to power our work. **Grassroots contributions are making a huge difference in this race. clean_body: If you need somebody who will champion the concerns of hardworking families and work day and night so that all of us can win, here I am. Send me back to the Senate. | | Derek -- Expanding our Democratic Senate majority comes down to Georgia. That’s why, before Wednesday’s end-of-month deadline -- and before this critical runoff election -- With reproductive freedom and continued progress for workers and families on the line, the people of Georgia deserve a champion for the people. If you need somebody who will champion the concerns of hardworking families and work day and night so that all of us can win, here I am. Send me back to the Senate. My campaign has just eight days before the runoff election, and we need resources to power our work. Grassroots contributions are making a huge difference in this race. I need supporters like you to make your first donation of the year. Will you split a $10 contribution between my reelection campaign and the DNC to win in eight days and elect Democrats nationwide? With your support, we can call more voters, knock on more doors, and ensure the people of Georgia have their voices heard. We can all do this together, Derek. I know it’s a tough fight ahead, but we’ve won before, and we can win again. So, I'm once again counting on grassroots supporters like you to power this movement to victory in next week’s runoff: It's an honor to fight for you and beside you. We can’t give up now. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Draft DeSantis
subject: Look at the damage Biden caused ,Peter.
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974806:6K7kCuGN2:m:1:3374627611:CC3C089B04054D9C3826DAB5C963E2B3:r)

Peter,

In 2020, Ron DeSantis was criticized for keeping schools open.

But today's National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) results once again prove that **_Ron made the right decision_. **

In Florida, adjusted for demographics, 4th-grade students are #1 in both Reading and Math! This the highest NAEP Ranking in the state's history.

Ron made the right call in Florida. Now we need him to make the right calls for our nation.

We're Ready for Ron, an America First grassroots movement working to recruit Ron for President. We've set a goal to raise $35,000 by the end of November to help us gain more signatures to convince Ron to run in 2024.

[_**If you 're ready to put America's children first, click here to send your urgent gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974806:6K7kCuGN2:m:1:3374627611:CC3C089B04054D9C3826DAB5C963E2B3:r)

**It was Biden's decision to shut down schools that had****terrible consequences for America's children.**

In 2022, _the average fourth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 5 points_ and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2005.

_The average eighth-grade mathematics score_ _**decreased**_ _by 8 points_ compared to 2019 and was lower than all previous assessment years going back to 2003.

_**Can America 's children afford to keep falling behind?**_

You can help us meet our goal before the end of the month by**clicking below and donating.**

[_**Click here to help recruit Ron for President >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61974806:6K7kCuGN2:m:1:3374627611:CC3C089B04054D9C3826DAB5C963E2B3:r)

Thank you,

Draft DeSantis

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Cyber Monday’s BEST. DEAL. EVER. 6 More Years Of Selfless, Awe-Inspiring Senate Leadership from Raphael Warnock
body:
Early voting is underway
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b00196f-07d3-406d-bd84-ef907fb06f22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | With **Cyber Monday** upon us, deals are flooding all of our inboxes. **[But the best deal for our country today--and every day--is investing in returning a man of honor, compassion and moral strength, Senator Raphael Warnock, to the U.S. Senate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69abd1d2-7ce7-4c0c-bc81-2833910ce7ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_(...or you could see it as keeping a violent misogynist who'd ban all abortion, put a gun to his wife's head and threatened to "blow her brains out," and kisses Trump's a** like it's his job, Herschel Walker, far away from power over our lives. Whichever works for you!)_** **_Today, early voting started all across Georgia for the Georgians in this community--so make a plan to vote today if you can!_** _**On December 6th, with everyone's help today, we can ****close this deal and give Democrats the 51st Senate seat so we need to get SO MUCH MORE DONE for our families and communities.**_ We're not telling you not to get that tv you've always wanted on Cyber Monday! (We have our own wish list.) Just to remind you to **[_take advantage of election day, Tuesday, December 6th--the best deal you'll ever be offered and one that will last six years_ _!_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d1ff2c5-2e1c-4eb0-ad9d-cea91d704ec3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Cyber Monday’s BEST. DEAL. EVER. 6 More Years Of Selfless, Awe-Inspiring Leadership**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89361e7a-c23f-4b96-bb78-1a66851f9e88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [**Can you join the Blue Amp Action community in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to help deal Senator Warnock into the Senate, and deal a blow to the vapid, violent Herschel Walker's chances of ever going to Washington as anything more than a tourist?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9ccbd45b-e10b-409c-a8a4-3127fa5ca008/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Wishing you a happy holiday season, with our thanks for being part of our community!
---
Cliff
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4875f670-cd0b-4e41-8e8f-5791fe711c4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

|

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde093045-de71-4850-a9d7-691fa5969f6e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
