name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc3m7grglro600n3lie2h47a25o6jklevegb68a0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8pj7c9h2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81d3dmpc46ng4jlje5jcla9kn064el5002q0j5o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8pj7c9h2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg53s76fgtlcbtlf997l000olpnjqjgebv103qb0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8pj7c9h2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0rid72bdm5nldrdl6n5usuh62lctf2sb507oj8o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8pj7c9h2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3nbf79tloge1a03sqq10r7ulrrieriqu1p9gq2o_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8pj7c9h2bs)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zumnc9shomfvfnl2nuru8fkfg1mbh6quad577gv0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8pj7c9h2bs)** [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zidndtdnig9tokvguf2hr9t07ohs3dncdesojnag_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8pj7c9h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhjuegh77o47muovqlil9rk9e439a0bgi2o1j5ag_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8pj7c9h2bs) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt70m129h0e56f3j3nj917js7e8gc8d8ptldmgqg_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8pj7c9h2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl14fcoqdmdt6in2ijjumtvg3lj8bor9sp3tt2po_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm8pj7c9h2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: NSF Awards $576,061 to Combat Science Misinformation in Black Communities
body:
Keeping with its mission of combating disinformation, the Biden administration is giving professors at a public university over half a million dollars to fight science-related misinformation and misperceptions in black communities.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 28, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61218&L=28490&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2NpZW5jZS1taXNpbmZvLWluLWJsYWNrLWNvbW11bml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE) | **[NSF Awards $576,061 to Combat Science Misinformation in Black Communities](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61218&L=28490&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2NpZW5jZS1taXNpbmZvLWluLWJsYWNrLWNvbW11bml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)** Keeping with its mission of combating disinformation, the Biden administration is giving professors at a public university over half a million dollars to fight science-related misinformation and misperceptions in black communities. The goal is to counter inequity and mistrust in scientific information and understand science misinformation in black communities, according to the government agency that is doling out the money for the research, the National Science Foundation (NSF). [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61218&L=28490&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2NpZW5jZS1taXNpbmZvLWluLWJsYWNrLWNvbW11bml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

It also asked for communications with several federal agencies, including the Justice Department, the Capitol Police, and the FBI. Judicial Watch also asked for the identities of the persons at the Pelosi home at the time of the incident. clean_body: Keeping with its mission of combating disinformation, the Biden administration is giving professors at a public university over half a million dollars to fight science-related misinformation and misperceptions in black communities. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 28, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Keeping with its mission of combating disinformation, the Biden administration is giving professors at a public university over half a million dollars to fight science-related misinformation and misperceptions in black communities. The goal is to counter inequity and mistrust in scientific information and understand science misinformation in black communities, according to the government agency that is doling out the money for the research, the National Science Foundation (NSF). ---|--- | | | | = | = In its November 2022 request to the district attorney, Judicial Watch noted a news report stating that news organizations had been rebuffed on similar requests and, pursuant to the California Public Records Act, asked for, in addition to the recording and camera footage: All records of communications, including emails and text messages, between the SFDAO [San Francisco District Attorney’s Office] and the San Francisco Police Department concerning the incident. It also asked for communications with several federal agencies, including the Justice Department, the Capitol Police, and the FBI. Judicial Watch also asked for the identities of the persons at the Pelosi home at the time of the incident. = ---|--- | | | | | In its appeal Judicial Watch points out that the lower court was mistaken when it upheld the FBI’s Glomar response (neither confirming nor denying the existence of records) because the FBI previously acknowledged the existence of the records in multiple ways. For instance, court records filed in support of a criminal case include the FBI’s statement of facts that provides the defendant’s address, which was obtained through “his Bank of America account and recent Expedia transactions.” ---|--- | | | | == | == The head of the federal agency created after 9/11 to protect the nation’s transportation system is accused of fraud, waste, and abuse of authority for unlawfully deploying assets to the Mexican border to perform duties unrelated to transportation, according to a report filed with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Inspector General. == ---|--- | | | Washington Examiner Judicial Watch and news organizations have attempted to obtain the materials under California’s Public Records Act but have been nixed by newly elected District Attorney Brooke Jenkins. Controversy still dogs the Oct. 28 break-in of House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s (D-CA) home, especially after an NBC reporter was suspended for reporting facts that court records show are true. == Newsmax Legal experts rallied to Donald Trump’s defense Friday in criticizing Attorney General Merrick Garland’s appointment of former federal attorney Jack Smith as special counsel to head the Department of Justice’s investigations of the former president. == == Fox News Conservatives on Twitter tore into CBS News for finally admitting that the controversial Hunter Biden laptop — containing the personal files and shady business dealings of President Joe Biden’s son and foreign countries — is real. == = = | CLIPS | = | | == | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | == | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

| We are beyond desperate, Friend.

The election on Tuesday did not go as we expected. Instead of a red wave, all we got was a red ripple. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2jc8tj7opvd9mgh0pn6lcfrg59din409lu18v50_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfed9mepgb5c9m6ermfd3keion1d70euqm8ohieuqe4p1meppmcpr164o60tplc3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9omcs9immp6fcjhcor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm9or7c5hm8o724no)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4d5tj8dm9ucnnkhvchs1da3op6g2j22kmgj3i70_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm2or4c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs2q6uat1lndb5p0t13ptjfqmg341kir0uf4g0f0_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm2or4c3h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5mktd7e41j8rhuqcsrlsscd076ede9ptl3ogqj8_rp22sh2s8i66or4sdjm2or4c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu5der8b0tv36idtnoehsm52qvfo68tclj9tofqo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3cjhmeob3chge49fg)

name: Raphael Warnock via Team Jayapal
subject: Georgians are heading to the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter – I'm fired up!
Early voting is underway for our runoff election here in Georgia. Our team is on the ground right now – knocking on doors and mobilizing the voters who will help us keep Georgia blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority.
But we have a problem: Mitch McConnell's super PAC is funneling over $50 million into our state to flood the airwaves with attack ads and elect Herschel Walker. **I'm worried that if we don't fight back ASAP, we could get outspent and drowned out right as voters head to the polls.**
**That's why we set an ambitious $2 million end-of-month fundraising goal—so we have the resources we need to spread our pro-Georgia message to voters in this final stretch and win.** But with time running out before this critical deadline, we're not on track to reach our goal.
**[So, I'm personally asking: Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Pramila Jayapal to help us hit our final end-of-month goal, reach more voters, and keep Georgia blue?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23829?refcode=em20221128-1895&t=1&akid=1895%2E420207%2E7er69O)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/23829?refcode=em20221128-1895&t=20&akid=1895%2E420207%2E7er69O)**
I'm deeply appreciative of you, Peter – today and every day. Let's go win this thing!
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221128-1895-footer&t=21&refcode2=1895_420207_7er69O&akid=1895%2E420207%2E7er69O)**

name: Keep Georgia Blue
subject: Only 8 days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We need YOUR help to maintain our momentum
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221128-8147-header&t=1&akid=8147%2E434096%2Ewo_e8x)
Derek,
After laying everything we had out for Georgia over these past couple months, we’re tired and running low on resources. But we can’t afford to slow down!
Rev. Warnock is in a close runoff, but Republicans are mobilizing voters across the state.
With less than 8 DAYS to reach Democrats all over Georgia to make sure they turn out to vote again, we can’t afford to fall behind.
**[We need the grassroots team that pushed us to victory in 2020, that flipped the Senate blue in 2021, and that has kept Georgia competitive in 2022 to step up one more time. Will you rush a donation split between the Democratic Party of Georgia and John Fetterman so we can reach every voter we need to help Rev. Warnock over the finish line?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221128-1?refcode=em20221128-8147&refcode2=8147_434096_wo_e8x&akid=8147%2E434096%2Ewo_e8x)**

Everything we do between now and December 6th will be critical in sending Rev. Warnock back to the Senate.

subject: The final stretch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
With just eight days left, your contribution will make a real difference.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15505%2E3422442%2ExjMnkU)
Derek,
We’re just eight days away from the runoff election in Georgia and early voting is already underway. **[Can you support Raphael Warnock in this final stretch?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13973?refcode=EMAD29_GAR_20221128_V1_F&t=2&akid=15505%2E3422442%2ExjMnkU)**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13973?refcode=EMAD29_GAR_20221128_V1_F&t=3&akid=15505%2E3422442%2ExjMnkU)**
We won’t just give you another long list of reasons why this race matters—you probably know that keeping Raphael Warnock in the Senate is key to _every single_ Democratic priority. And while Mitch McConnell and Republican super PACs are spending millions to try and flip Georgia red and send Herschel Walker to the Senate, **Raphael (like Katie!) doesn’t accept any corporate PAC money** --so he counts on grassroots supporters pitching in.
With just eight days left, your contribution will make a real difference.
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your split contribution between Katie Porter and Raphael Warnock instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13974?refcode=EMAD29_GAR_20221128_V1_F-el&t=4&akid=15505%2E3422442%2ExjMnkU) [Donate $25 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13975?refcode=EMAD29_GAR_20221128_V1_F-el&t=5&akid=15505%2E3422442%2ExjMnkU) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13976?refcode=EMAD29_GAR_20221128_V1_F-el&t=6&akid=15505%2E3422442%2ExjMnkU) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13977?refcode=EMAD29_GAR_20221128_V1_F-el&t=7&akid=15505%2E3422442%2ExjMnkU) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13978?refcode=EMAD29_GAR_20221128_V1_F-el&t=8&akid=15505%2E3422442%2ExjMnkU) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13973?refcode=EMAD29_GAR_20221128_V1_F&t=9&akid=15505%2E3422442%2ExjMnkU)

Thanks for your support!
Team Porter

name: Team AOC
subject: Welcome to the Squad!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Welcome Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman!
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221128-3659-header&t=1&akid=3659%2E2526796%2EvE5E5B)
Sometimes it’s simply good news, and we’re here for it! **We at Team AOC are so thrilled to announce that Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman are now officially members of the Squad Victory Fund.**
Founded in 2019, the Squad Victory Fund is a joint fundraising committee that supports the re-election campaigns and leadership PACs of the Squad. Originally consisting of Reps. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (NY-14), Ilhan Omar (MN-05), Ayanna Pressley (MA-07), and Rashida Tlaib (MI-13), **the SVF will now also include Rep. Cori Bush (MO-01) and our neighbor Rep. Jamaal Bowman (NY-16).**
[Will you join us in celebrating the addition of Representatives Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman by splitting a contribution between our movement and the Squad Victory Fund today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221128.rg3CW4&refcode=em20221128-3659-P_FND_ANO_SVF&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3659%2E2526796%2EvE5E5B)
**[Donate to the Squad Victory Fund](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221128.rg3CW4&refcode=em20221128-3659-P_FND_ANO_SVF&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3659%2E2526796%2EvE5E5B)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221128.rg3CW4&refcode=em20221128-3659-P_FND_ANO_SVF&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3659%2E2526796%2EvE5E5B)
_Photo credit: Corey Torpie_
**We are so excited to bring supporters from Rep. Bush and Rep. Bowman’s districts into this movement to continue our work of bringing transformative change to working families across the country.**
Congrats to Cori and Jamaal!
See you on the front lines,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221128?refcode=em20221128-3659-P_FND_ANO_SVF&t=23&refcode2=3659_2526796_vE5E5B&akid=3659%2E2526796%2EvE5E5B)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221128-3659-P_FND_ANO_SVF&t=24&akid=3659%2E2526796%2EvE5E5B)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3659%2E2526796%2EvE5E5B) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3659%2E2526796%2EvE5E5B) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3659%2E2526796%2EvE5E5B)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

subject: The MOST important thing you can do right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
This is our last chance to expand the majority
| | | This is Kati with the DSCC.

At this very moment, Democrats are gearing up to call ONE MILLION Georgia voters in a **_massive_** day of action tomorrow. It’s _crucial_ that we get out the vote for Sen. Raphael Warnock ahead of next week’s runoff election, and we know the margin of victory in this race will be _razor-thin!_

But here’s the catch -- **we need all hands on deck to reach that goal of having a Million-Dial Day, but we're short of volunteers in Pennsylvania** \-- so we're putting out an emergency call for help to reach Democratic voters and make sure they know about next Tuesday’s runoff.

**[Please, this is our last chance to expand our Senate majority, and Georgia voters only have until next TUESDAY to cast their ballots! Will you join our virtual phone bank to make sure EVERY Georgia Democrat turns out to vote?](https://go.dscc.org/go/11278?t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221128-Kati-GAPhoneCalls-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221128-Kati-GAPhoneCalls-Pros-sl1&akid=8977%2E9716520%2EBZvPzZ)**
| | [YES, I WILL SAVE SENATOR WARNOCK’S SEAT](https://go.dscc.org/go/11278?t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221128-Kati-GAPhoneCalls-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221128-Kati-GAPhoneCalls-Pros-sl1&akid=8977%2E9716520%2EBZvPzZ)
---

I spent much of yesterday making calls just like these, and I was blown away by how GRATEFUL voters were to be reminded about the runoff. With the experts warning of a toss-up race and with so much at stake, **no one wants to wake up on December 7th to find out they missed their chance to be heard.**

**[So please, sign up to make calls right now and help personally save Senator Warnock’s seat!](https://go.dscc.org/go/11278?t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221128-Kati-GAPhoneCalls-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221128-Kati-GAPhoneCalls-Pros-sl1&akid=8977%2E9716520%2EBZvPzZ)**
I know we can count on you,

Kati
Chief Digital Officer, DSCC

| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/10052?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221128-Kati-GAPhoneCalls-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221128-Kati-GAPhoneCalls-Pros-sl1&akid=8977%2E9716520%2EBZvPzZ)
